title: By Your Hands
lyrics:
You held my hand before I knew
How heavy life could feel
You wiped my tears, kissed my head
Made the broken moments heal
When every road I chose went wrong
You never turned away
You stood right there, steady and strong
And bowed your head to pray

I didn’t know it then
But heaven heard you say my name

I was always honored to be your son
Every day, every battle won
From the crowd, I knew your voice
Soft but sure, it was your choice
Your strength, your love, the life you lived
Were the greatest gifts you’d give
Every part of who I am
Was formed by your faithful hands

You taught me truth without a stage
Just by the way you stood
You showed me love, you showed me grace
You showed me what is good
Late nights, lights still on for me
Homework spread across the floor
You gave me more than answers then
You gave me something more

When I was lost and couldn’t see
You walked the road ahead of me

I was always honored to be your son
In every place I’ve ever run
From the crowd, I felt your prayers
Carried gently through the air
Your guidance, faith, the path you knew
Led my heart to gospel truth
Every part of who I am
Was formed by your faithful hands

Winnie the Pooh and bedtime stories
Star Wars dreams and borrowed glories
Battlestar on quiet nights
Learning wrong and learning right
Every memory, every tear
Every laugh, every year
All the parts of me I see
Are your love living in me

I am forever your grateful son
For all you were and all you’ve done
Even now, I hear your voice
Calling me to make the right choice
Your heart, your hope, your steady view
Still leads me in the things I do
Every breath, every prayer I am
Carries you in who I am

I cherish you
I honor you
I carry you with me

title: Theres Always Enough
lyrics:
Coffee on the counter, sunrise in the room
She’s already cookin’, says it’s never too soon
Bacon in the skillet, biscuits in the pan
She feeds us all with more than just her hands

There’s always somethin’ simmerin’, always one more chair
She doesn’t count the portions, as she says a prayer
She smiles and says, “Y’all sit down and eat”
And somehow there’s enough for everyone she meets

There’s always enough when she’s around
Plates get filled, love gets found
From the kitchen table to our church home
She feeds our bodies and our souls
Yeah, we all come hungry, we all go whole
There’s always enough

Dinner every night, Coffee in her cup
She’s the one makes a little extra, says, “Go on, fill it up”
Late-night leftovers, wrapped up tight
She sends ‘em home with us so we’ll be alright

She shops for the house, the lake, and everyone else
Keeps a list in her purse, never thinkin’ of herself
Plays a game at the table, then back to the stove
Always givin’ more than we ever know

There’s always enough when she’s around
Plates get filled, love gets found
From the kitchen table to our church home
She feeds our bodies and our souls
Yeah, we all come hungry, we all go whole
There’s always enough

Out on the lake, cooler packed just right
Food packed up for the long, slow ride
Coffee still warm, sun sinkin’ low
She thanks the Lord for the life she knows

There’s always enough in the way she cares
Extra food, an answered prayer
If you’re tired or feeling low
She’ll say, “Come eat,” and you’ll know
Yeah, love shows up when she’s around
There’s always enough

There’s always enough

title: Things I Carry
lyrics:
Backyard dirt on a pair of jeans
Neighborhood kids, old routines
Kickball days and a football throw
Driveway hoop till the sun hung low
Baseball dust, a borrowed glove
Learning early what mattered most
How to play fair, shake a hand
And try to be the best man I can

I carry your voice in the way I talk
Your shadow in the way I walk
In these hands that are calloused and worn
From the life I’ve lived, the roads I’ve gone
You didn’t say much, you showed me how
What’s worth holding and letting go now
I’m not the man you always were
But I carry the lessons you gave to me

Fishing lines and quiet days
Cold lake swims, long snowy plays
Snow cream laughs in the kitchen light
Family games on a Friday night
Horseshoe men and a chessboard fight
Win or lose, you played it right
You taught me strength comes in different ways
And not every battle’s mine to face

I carry your faith in the way I pray
Your steady hand in the words I say
In this face that time has shaped
Trying to walk a narrower way
Church doors open, head held high
Working hard, never asking why
I don’t stand as firm as you always did
But I honor the way you live

You stood for truth when it cost you more
Never moved just to please the floor
I’ve learned respect from watching you
Even when I don’t see it through

I hear you now in quieter ways
In choices made, in nights I pray
In these rough hands doing what they can
Trying to be a better man
If someday I pass one thing along
It’s the good I saw, the right from wrong
I may walk a different road than you
But I carry your heart in the things I do

Yeah… I carry your heart

title: My Son
lyrics:
Born in the hush of a brand-new year
Y2K skies, the future unclear
Tiny hands wrapped around my thumb
Didn’t know yet what you’d become

Sleepless nights, late-night drives
Learning your laugh, learning your cries
Time felt slow, then it learned to run
I held the world in you my little son

They say time flies when love is strong
I blinked once and you were gone

You were a child, you’re a son
Still my reason when days feel long
From scraped-up hands to finding your song
I’ve been watching you all along

Every step, every wrong and right
You grew your wings right in my sight
I’m proud of who you’ve become
I see a big heart in you my son

Bob the Builder fixing dreams
Danny Phantom in between
Fairly Odd wishes late at night
Jimmy Neutron thinking bright

Avatar teaching balance and fire
Hannah Montana—your first stage desire
With a mop for hair, a mic in your hand
Singing “a moment like this”, you took your stand

Drake and Josh, iCarly laughs
Sweet Life chaos, Wizards’ magic crafts
Charmed spells played with your cousin near
You made the ordinary disappear

I saw the spark before you did
A quiet fire no one hid

You were a child, you’re a son
Learning who you’d grow into
Every note, every truth you sung
You were already becoming you

Through TV glow and living room lights
You practiced dreams on borrowed time
I’m proud of who you’ve become
I still see that child in you my son

Saxophone case, marching lines
Counting steps, keeping time
Jazz band nights, campus days
Music pulling you your own way

Piano keys under thoughtful hands
Smart enough to question the plan
U.C.A. halls, you earned your place
Purpose written on your face

I worried, I hoped, I let you go
Held my breath, then watched you grow
You don’t need me like you did before
But even now I love you more and more

You were a child, you’re my son
Still my pride when the lights go dim
Every mile that you’ve outrun
I see a strength rising in you

You made your way, you found your voice
You turned your fear into a choice
I’m proud who you’ve become
Forever a child, forever a son

From year two-thousand to here and now
I’d choose you again, I’d show you how
No matter how far, no matter where you run
I’m always a parent and you a son

title: Higher Aim
lyrics:
Mind like a rapid round, thoughts never slow
Words come quick like a loaded flow
Laughs out loud, can’t sit still
Heart full but the safety’s on still
Raised by a lioness, single-hand strong
She taught him right from the break of dawn
Prayers at night, steel in his spine
Faith locked deep like a sightline

He’ll talk your ear off, yeah that’s true
But he’ll drop everything just to help you

He’s a fast tongue, full auto kind of man
Loves like iron locked in his hands
Runs on faith, caffeine, sweat, and grace
Built to protect, never to waste
When the world jams, he clears the way
Points lost souls toward higher aim
Not a weapon—he’s a steady light
Forged in love, walking upright

Early mornings, iron plates
Pushin’ weight while he Looks to heaven's gates
Thumbs sore from the controller grind
Late-night battles, pixel fights
Fit check mirror, snap then streak
Coffee stops every other street
Sweet treats lined up like trophies won
Fuel for the race he’s always run

Two keys—one truck, one low ride
Same man, different gears inside

He’s a fast tongue, full auto kind of man
Loves like iron locked in his hands
Runs on faith, caffeine, sweat, and grace
Built to protect, never to waste
When the world jams, he clears the way
Points lost souls toward higher aim
Not a weapon—he’s a steady light
Forged in love, walking upright

He don’t flinch when the call comes through
Drops his plans just to carry you
Heart beats loud but his aim stays true
Knows who he serves, knows what to do
Crowned by mercy, sealed by blood
Chambered hope in a world of mud

Yeah he talks fast, but he loves deeper
Prays hard, holds tight, never weaker
When he commits, it’s chambered tight
One woman, one faith, one life
If you’re lost, he’ll stand between
Danger and you—no in-between
When the smoke fades, one truth remains
Some men are built for higher aims

Not forged by war, but born to stand
A steady soul with an open hand

title: Keeper of the Pines
lyrics:
Sunrise through the county pines
Coffee hot, she’s more than just on time
Badge on green, boots in dirt
Paperwork first, then hands to work
Trail maps marked, radios hum
She knows this land like a drum

From office lights to the open sky
She carries both worlds side by side

She’s the keeper of the pines and the winding roads
She's more than a manager; she runs it all
Chainsaw singin’ when the old trees fall
Uniform dusty, sleeves rolled strong
FourRunner crawls where the blacktop ends
Weekend wild with her best friend
Sweet treats ready, their brews poured
Yeah, this park knows her—every mile, every chord

Cleanup days when the crowds roll out
Trash bags full, no complainin’ mouth
Fix a fence, file the plans
Handle calls with a steady hand
She’ll smile soft but hold the line
Earned respect, not just the sign

She keeps it fair, keeps it right
Last to leave, first in the light

She’s the keeper of the pines and the winding roads
She's more than a manager; she runs it all
Chainsaw singin’ when the old trees fall
Uniform dusty, sleeves rolled strong
FourRunner crawls where the blacktop ends
Weekend wild with her best friend
Sweet treats ready, their brews poured
Yeah, this park knows her—every mile, every chord

Friday night, sun sinkin’ low
Maps folded up, time to go
Campfire sparks, his hand in hers
Stars remind her of life's worth

She’s the keeper of the pines and the quiet nights
Guardian of the land and the firefly light
From the desk-top grind to the chainsaw bite
She does it all, and she does it right
FourRunner hums past the gate at dusk
Freedom earned, love and trust
Sweet treats shared, their brews poured
She don’t just work here—she guards its soul

When the gates close and the moon runs high
The land rests easy—as she passes by

title: Remington the Pump Truck Guy
lyrics:
Alarm clock rattlin’ next to a .45
Steel toes hittin’ concrete before sunrise
Coffee black, diesel breath
Grease on my hands, yeah I earn that check
Pins locked in, pressure’s right
Boss man sayin’ “Pour day—don’t be late”
Another slab, another town
Another reason they call me now

Dust in my lungs, sweat in my eyes
Everybody watchin’ when the mud starts flyin’
One bad move and the whole thing’s toast
I’m the last word at the end of the hose

Boom up!
Hoses down!
Shake that ground when I swing around
Let it roll, let it pound
That concrete moves when I come to town
Boom up!
Hoses down!
Red dirt ring when it hits the ground
From the ground to the sky
Ain’t nothin’ built without Remington the pump truck guy

Swing that boom like a switchblade knife
One hand steady, other hand on life
Radio barkin’, crew yellin’ “Slow!”
Too much push and the line’ll blow
Watch the slump, keep it mean
No cold joints on my pour scene
Walls, decks, bridges, steel and stone
Every drop’s gotta stand alone

Sun beatin’ down on a hard-hat grin
I don’t rush it, I just dig in
Clock don’t scare me, rain don’t bite
We pour ‘til the finish comes out right

Boom up!
Hoses down!
Line stay clean when I’m runnin’ that pound
Keep it tight, keep it loud
That slab won’t lie when it’s all said out
Boom up!
Hoses down!
Whole site knows the sound
From the dirt to the sky
You don’t stand tall without Remington the pump truck guy

Hydraulics hum like a backroad song
Engine growl sayin’ “Bring it on”
No shortcuts, no second tries
When the mud sets hard, so does pride

One shot, one pour, one name on the line
Do it wrong, it’s there for life

Boom up!
Hoses down!
Let that pressure shake the town
Pump it clean, pump it true
Every finish proves what I do
Boom up!
Hoses down!
Sun go low but we’re still around
When the dust settles high
That slab stands proud—Remington the pump truck guy

Wash the rig, crack the gate
Another pour put food on the plate
Boom folded up, engine sigh
Same road home— Remington the pump truck guy

title: Alivia - Play with Me
lyrics:
My name is Alivia,
Magic sparkles in the golden glow
Morning sun waves hello to me,
Inviting me to play and grow

I spin in circles on the living room floor,
Dreaming dreams I’ve never dreamed before
I laugh out loud, the whole world beams…
And I ask it brightly…

If you’re listening, wherever you are,
Let your heart come dancing, near or far…

Will you play with me?
Come and leap with me
Spin around in a world so free
Will you play with me?
Come and see what I see
Every day’s a melody

Will you play, play, play with me?

The floor is lava—jump so high!
Freeze dance stops, then run, then fly
Tumble, twist, gymnastic dreams,
Pirouettes and trampoline beams

Building kingdoms with LEGO towers,
Castles crowned with magic flowers
Barbies chatter, stories grow,
Wherever my imagination flows

Every game’s a rainbow ride,
Come inside, laugh by my side…

Will you play with me?
Come and sing with me
Hear the joy in the harmony
Will you play with me?
Come and be with me
Life is brighter when you’re with me

Will you play, play, play with me?

Dress-up twirls in sparkly gowns,
Magic shoes that spin around
Royal parades and fairy shows,
Whimsy’s everywhere it goes

At Lolli and Pop’s, love’s in the air,
Stories swirl, and giggles flare
Big warm hugs and sugar sweet,
Every moment feels complete

Mommy’s hugs, safe and bright,
Cheering me on, holding me tight
She helps me learn, helps me grow,
Her love is magic I always know

If I feel small or a little blue,
Her arms lift me, gentle and true
She’s my sunlight, brave and light,
My hero in the darkest night

School is bright, friends abound,
Kindness and laughter all around
Sharing toys and shining smiles,
Adventure fills the classroom aisles

Adalyn’s hands are small but strong,
We dance, we laugh, we sing our song
I show her how, she shows me joy,
Sisters together, pure and buoyed

Will you play with me?
Come and dream with me
Build a world of what could be
Will you play with me?
Come and fly with me
This is where our story begins

Will you play, play, play with me?

My name is Alivia—now you know,
With love and dreams, I’m free to grow
With song and laughter, endlessly…
Will you play with me?

title: At Work
lyrics:
Where’s Lolli? Where’s Pop?
Where’s Mom? Where’s Dad?
Where’s KK at right now?
He grins real big like he’s got a secret to add
He points to the sky, throws his head back and laughs
“At work!” he says, like that’s all that matters

Paw Patrol on the TV glow
Spidey swings real high
Bluey laughs, Toy Story rolls
“Woody, Buzz!”—he locks his eyes
Say it again, yeah, one more time
“Woody, Buzz!” till we’re all smiling wide

He’s a big little man with a heart so strong
Runs down the hall, falls down, gets up, moves on
Dancing through life like nothing’s wrong
Full of love, sent from above
Yeah, heaven knew just what it was doing
When it sent us him to love

He plays all day, don’t slow him down
Feet don’t quit, he’s always found
Running, laughing, spinning ‘round
Trips, tumbles—no tears now
Back on his feet, he’s gone again
Braver than most grown men

He’s a big little man with a heart so warm
One little hug, and the whole room’s transformed
A little charmer in a little pair of arms
Full of love, sent from above
Yeah, heaven knew just what it was doing
When it sent us him to love

“Ready for a nap? Night night?” we say
He shakes his head, “No,” every way
Two minutes later, right where he stands
Fast asleep with dreams in his hands

He’s a big little man, our joy, our song
Making ordinary days feel long-gone wrong
We’ll laugh about this when he’s all grown
Full of love, sent from above
Every moment’s a gift we’re holding
With this boy we’re blessed to love

Where’s Lolli? Where’s Pop?
He laughs real loud—
“At work!”

title: Watching you Grow
lyrics:
She’s got wide blue eyes, taking it all in
Every little moment feels brand new
Tiny hands reaching for the world
Like she’s saying, “What’s this? Let me learn”
Every corner, every sound
Curiosity spins her around

She wants to touch it, taste it, hold it tight
Everything’s a wonder in her sight

Oh, how can she be this sweet
Those little hands, those little feet
That soft grin that melts my heart
From the very, very start
Her laugh hits your soul just right
Turns the dark into light
I love watching her play and grow
More than she’ll ever know

She puts every little thing in her mouth
Every treasure she can find
Little fingers, little toes
Wiggling with no sense of time
She smiles like she knows a secret
Like love’s all she’s ever known

Every day she’s changing fast
But I hold every moment like it’ll last

Oh, how can she be this sweet
Those little hands, those little feet
That soft grin that melts my heart
From the very, very start
Her laugh hits your soul just right
Turns the dark into light
I love watching her play and grow
More than she’ll ever know

When the night falls soft and slow
The whole world’s in for a show
Moonlight dancing in her eyes
Dreams too big for lullabies

Oh, how can she be this sweet
Heavens wrapped in those tiny feet
Every smile, every sound
Makes my whole world slow down
And one day she’ll walk her own road
But tonight, just know
I’ll be right here, heart wide open
Watching you play and grow

Little hands, little feet
My favorite kind of treat

title: Little Brother
lyrics:
Light breaks through the galaxy floor,
A twin sun rising, adventure calls once more
Your laugh echoes across the stars,
Two shadows chasing fate afar

We ran through forests, leaves beneath our feet,
Caught baby Rancors in a daring feat
Lightsabers hum in a sunlit glade,
Training as Jedi, our fears allayed
Every jump, every fall, every leap we take,
Dreams of kyber crystals and paths we make

If the darkness calls, you’ll hold my hand,
If I stumble, you’ll help me stand
Side by side, through trials untold,
Together we’re fearless, together we’re bold

Little brother, across the stars,
We fought through worlds, we healed our scars
Krayt Dragons roaring, pearls to claim,
Every battle lighting our names
From shared rooms to galaxies wide,
I watched you grow…a Jedi by my side

Rockets and ramps, flying leaves like spells,
Counting victories where the empire dwells
Lightsabers clashing in twin-sun skies,
Every adventure with wonder in your eyes
Capturing beasts, uncovering lore,
Kyber crystals shining on the floor

Working together, through shadow and light,
Learning the Force, embracing the fight
No matter how far the stars may bend,
You were my story, my beginning, my end

Little brother, feel the Force,
Guiding our steps on this endless course
Baby Rancors tamed, Krayt Dragons slain,
Kyber crystals found in the desert plains
From shared dreams to the man you’ve become,
I watched you rise… my Jedi, my brother

Now you wield your saber true,
A husband, a father, and hero too
The galaxy wide, yet you remain
That same bright spark, my twin flame

Time keeps spinning, but I know,
Through every star, you’ll never walk alone

Little brother, soar beyond,
Through suns and moons, your legacy shines on
Every duel, every quest, every trial you own,
Proof of how far our Force has grown
Through all the worlds, and every fight we choose,
I’m proud of you… always with you

Two shadows fade into the starlight,
Different worlds, same bond burning bright
Little brother…
I watched you grow…

title: Mother of Two
lyrics:
It’s early morning in the day light,
Two little voices and a tired smile.

She’s rolling down the road in a Kia Sorento,
Iced coffee sweating in the cup holder slow.
A little bit hood, a little bit country soul,
Radio low, got a lot on her load.
Two car seats, bags packed in the back,
Says a quiet prayer, then she’s right on track.

She didn’t dream it’d be this way,
But she shows up strong every single day.
Every worry she carries inside,
She hides it when her girls look in her eyes.

She’s holding it together for two,
Doing what the whole world couldn’t do.
With love in her heart and faith in her hands,
She’s raising two little girls to stand.
Yeah, she’s tired, yeah, she’s true,
the grit, the love in her is for two.


TikTok recipes on a Saturday night,
Mess on the counter, baking something sweet just right.
Espresso shots when the days get long,
Singing along to an old church song.
Band-Aids, bedtime prayers, storybook dreams,
She pours her whole heart into everything.

She’s learning as she goes along,
Finding her way, proving she’s strong.
Being strong don’t mean never breaking down,
It means standing back up when life knocks you around.

She’s holding it together for two,
Doing what the whole world couldn’t do.
With love in her heart and faith in her hands,
She’s raising two little girls to stand.
Yeah, she’s sweet, yeah, she’s strong and true,
the grit, the love in her is for two.

Some nights she cries when the house is still,
Asking God quietly for strength and will.
But Sunday morning she’s dressed and ready,
Serving others, heart strong and steady.
She’s not perfect, but she’s enough,
That’s what real, holy love is made of.

She’s standing strong and taller for two,
Building roots and giving wings too.
If the world gets hard, she’ll stand between,
Teaching them who they’re meant to be.
Yeah, she’s brave, yeah, she’s strong and true,
the grit, the love in her is for two.

Two little hands, one steady heart,
Nothing to tear them apart

title: Genesis
lyrics:
Before the stars ever burned in the sky
Before a breath, before time
He spoke one word and the dark gave way
Light was born when He said “Let there be day”
Oceans bowed and the mountains stood
Every seed declared He’s good
From dust and clay He shaped our frame
Breathed life and He knew our name

We walked with Him in the cool of the dawn
Perfect love, nothing wrong

From the beginning You were there
Creator’s voice in the air
From the dust to the promise made
You’re the God who still saves
When we fall, when we stray
Your mercy makes a way
From the garden to the grave of time
Your plan, Your truth, Your light

A whisper lied, a choice was made
Shame rushed in, we hid our face
Hearts grew hard, blood hit the ground
Brother against brother, mercy cried out
The world grew loud with broken ways
Every thought drifting far from grace
But even then, His heart still grieved
Justice came, but mercy believed

Rain fell down, the old washed away
Hope survived in the ark of faith

From the beginning You were there
Creator’s voice in the air
From the flood to the promise made
You’re the God who still saves
When we fall, when we stray
Your mercy makes a way
From the garden to the grave of time
Your plan, Your truth, Your light

A rainbow stretched across the sky
“I won’t forget,” the Lord replied
Then Abram heard a distant call
“Trust Me now, I’ll bless them all”
Stars like sand, a promise sworn
Through Isaac, Jacob, Joseph torn
What was meant for evil schemes
You turned into a greater dream

From chaos to covenant
From fear to faith
You’ve been writing redemption
From page one to today

From the beginning You were there
Alpha speaking everywhere
From the dust to the promised land
You held the future in Your hands
Through every loss, through every flame
Your word and will remain the same
Genesis sings what the world still needs
A faithful God who sees

In the beginning, the word was with God
the word was God

title: Chop it like it’s hot!
lyrics:
Ticket flying, timer dying
Kitchen shaking, flames are rising
Floor is ice, I glide and spin
Raft in motion — dive right in

Pan flip, bass kick
Whole squad moving too quick
Onions flying, rice airborne
Three-star hustle since we were born

Dash left, snap right
Stove glowing neon bright
If we crash, we crash loud
Feed the chaos, feed the crowd

Hearts racing, plates we’re chasing
Spinning like we’re levitating
Drums building, strings ascending
Kitchen chaos never ending

Chop it! Toss it! Plate it fast!
If we fail, we blame the lag!
Dash left! Slide right!
Cook it up all through the night!

Feel that rhythm, feel that heat
Bass drop under dancing feet
If it burns we laugh it out —
Kitchen party knockout!

Ghost kitchen, floor divide
Teleport, now switch sides
Rice no bowl? That’s a crime
Who served raw chicken this time?!

Kevin shouting from the throne
We adapt — we hold our own
Fire sparks, extinguisher blast
Still we cook it lightning fast

808 under the pan
Funk bass groove, that’s the plan
Chaos rising, we don’t flop
We don’t quit — we level up

Chop! Chop! Dash! — HEY!
Chop! Chop! Dash! — HEY!

Who’s on fire? — HEY!
Who dropped rice? — HEY!
Who burned soup? — HEY!
Not me! — HEY!

Left side! — HEY!
Right side! — HEY!
Three stars now! — HEY!
All night! — HEY!

Chop it! Toss it! Plate it fast!
Screaming like we’re built to last!
Dash left! Slide right!
Cooking in a boss fight!

Strings soaring, drums ignite
Bass shaking every light
If it crashes, laugh it out —
Kitchen party knockout!

Kitchen party knockout!

Apron torn, flames still hot
Did we win? I forgot
Load the stage, one more round
Kitchen kings — we run this town

title: Deck 9 Kind of Love
lyrics:
Suitcases wobbling down the hall
Ship horn blows, that’s the curtain call
Leedoe deck heat, sunglasses glued
First thing we found? Ice cream—twice, no rules

Buffet plates stacked like a bad idea
Ship’s rocking just enough to make the hallway weird
Time slowed down the minute we sailed
Real life waved… we did not hail

We’re living that deck-nine kinda love
Ocean below, stars above
If the floor moves, we just laugh it off
Blame the waves when the ship won’t stop
No plans, no shame, just cruise control
Ice cream drips and buffet goals
Whole crew feeling fine, on ship time

Love and Marriage on the main stage
Crowd yelling answers they can’t erase
Someone learned something they didn’t need
Somebody laughed, somebody needs therapy

Elevators full, nobody knows why
Leedoe deck dancing like it’s July
Back to the room, surprise attack—
Towel animals judging us behind our back

We’re living that deck-nine kinda love
Ocean below, stars above
If the floor moves, we just laugh it off
Blame the waves when the ship won’t stop
No plans, no shame, just cruise control
Ice cream drips and buffet goals
Whole crew feeling fine, on ship time

feet lied

title: Lake House Weekend
lyrics:
Yeah—
Sun’s barely up but we already late

Load up the truck, throw the bags in back

Everybody piled in—let’s hit it!

Grillin’, flippin’, hear that sizzle speak

Roast marshmallows, make s’mores sweet
Barefoot dancin’ to a back porch beat
When tomorrow comes, we pack it up and do it again
Right here at the lake, yeah, livin’ it up, takin' it in

Till the next time the dock lights glow—

title: Who's Driving this Bus
lyrics:
We’re rollin’ down the highway fast
Coffee spillin’, runnin’ outta gas
GPS says “Turn around”
But we just keep on headin’ downtown

Wheel jerkin’ left and right
Radio blastin’ way too loud
If this is how it’s gonna go
Somebody better shout it out!

We’re swervin’ wide — just missing the sign!

Who’s driving this bus?!

We hit a curb — now we’re sideways!

Who’s driving this bus?!

We took the ramp — that was the wrong way!

WHO’S DRIVING THIS BUS?!

Hands up high if you feel that rush

Who’s driving this bus?!

White knuckles, holdin’ on to trust

Who’s driving this bus?!

Blinker’s on but we ain’t turnin’

Who’s driving this bus?!

Somebody tell me — WHO’S DRIVING THIS BUS?!

Mirror’s turned and horn blast won’t stop
Someone dropped their soda pop
GPS Recalculating, missed our street
Why we ridin’ in the passenger seat?

Speedin’ up when we should slow down
Roundabout, we’re goin’ round and round
If you’re at the wheel, I gotta ask —
You sure you passed that drivin’ class?

We’re swervin’ lanes — that don’t look safe!

Who’s driving this bus?!

We hit a cone — that wasn’t great!

Who’s driving this bus?!

We missed the exit — three times straight!

WHO’S DRIVING THIS BUS?!

Left foot brake, right foot gas
Somebody make this moment pass
Are we lost or just confused?
Did we let the wrong one choose?

If I’m honest, here’s the truth…
Maybe I’ve been dreamin' too.

Hands up high if you feel that rush
Who’s driving this bus?!
White knuckles, holdin’ on to trust
Who’s driving this bus?!
If we’re headed where we shouldn’t —
Maybe I should just…
move to the back of this bus!

WHO’S DRIVING THIS BUS?!

title: Card Drop
lyrics:
Alright… alright…
Everybody in the room, say it with me—
One, two, three!

CARD! (clap clap) DROP!
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!
Shuffle it, deal it, don’t stop, don’t stop
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!

ROLL! (hey!) DICE! (hey!)
TAKE! (hey!) TURNS! (hey!)
Laugh too loud, feelings might burn
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!

Cards hit the table, shuffling loud
UNO skip make the whole room shout
Flip 7 hopes, Phase 10 stress
Wild card fly—yeah, you guessed
Rummy Cube clack, Yahtzee roll
Tenzies fast hands, lose control
Score sheets messy, rules get bent
House rules made up right where we went

CARD! (clap clap) DROP!
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!
Deal it up, pass it around the block
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!

ROLL! (hey!) DICE! (hey!)
SING! (hey!) LOUD! (hey!)
Ice cream melt in the middle of the crowd
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!

Drinks on the side, jokes on deck
Puns so bad, show some respect
Put-down lines but it’s all love
Someone singing way off-above
“Who cares?” when the rules don’t fit
“Gonna write a song about that!”—quit
“Temu Rem!”—room erupts
“That’s just how she is!”—shrug it up

Blew It! yeah, somebody did
Mad for a minute, then they back in
Going out, busting, shouting names
Next round up—same old games

When I say CARD, you say DROP!
CARD! — DROP!
CARD! — DROP!
Who’s winning? (Not me!)
Who’s laughing? (Everybody!)

Nanny smiling, Pap Paw proud
Grands still sharp, great-grands loud
Dads and Moms talking trash
Uncles bold, Aunts keep stats
Brothers flex, sisters cheer
Cousins wild, friends family here
Same table, different nights
Same love, same laughs, same fights

CARD! (clap clap) DROP!
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!
Shuffle it, deal it, one more on top
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!

ROLL! (hey!) DICE! (hey!)
LAST! (hey!) ROUND! (hey!)
Win or lose, we still hang around
CARD! (clap clap) DROP!

Next week… same time…
CARD! DROP!

title: Spiritual Gym Anthem
lyrics:
One rep…
Two reps…
Three reps…
Four…
Put your hands on the bar—

Sun ain’t up but the lights are on
Cold steel hums like an old church song
Chalk on my hands, knees hit the floor
Prayin’ for strength, askin’ for more
Every scar’s got a story to tell
’Bout heaven above and a life lived well

Faith don’t flex till it’s under load
Pressure makes diamonds—that’s how it goes

One rep!
Two reps!
Three reps!
Four!
Every lift’s a battle, every breath is war
Push! Pull! Lift! — hear the angels roar
Bench! Shrug! Squat! — let the weak fall off
Iron sharpens iron, soul sharpens soul
Bar on my back but the cross is my goal

Iron!
Sharpens!
Iron!

Mirror don’t lie but it don’t define
What you carry in your heart or your state of mind
Spotter beside me, brother in Christ
Two hands ready when I’m losin’ the fight
Sweat hits the floor like baptism rain
Strength in the struggle, purpose in pain

Muscle burns but the spirit stands
Built by grace, not just calloused hands

One rep!
Two reps!
Three reps!
Four!
Every lift’s a battle, every breath is war
Push! Pull! Lift! — hear the angels roar
Bench! Shrug! Squat! — let the weak fall off
Iron sharpens iron, soul sharpens soul
Bar on my back but the cross is my goal

Strength ain’t given—it’s earned in the fire
Same way faith grows when you don’t let go

Hold the line! (Hold the line!)
Lock it out! (Lock it out!)
Every prayer’s a rep you grindin’ out!

One rep!
Two reps!
Three reps!
Four!
I lift the Name higher than I lift the bar

Every clang of iron makes a gospel sound
Iron sharpens iron, soul sharpens soul
Built by the Word and the weight of the load

Steel in my hands…
Faith in my chest…
Strong in the body—
Saved and blessed.

title: Iron Don’t Lie
lyrics:

cold bar

Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)
Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)

Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)
Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)

(Dips!)

Curls slow
(Squeeze that pain)

Squat!

(Explode!)

Bench! (Press!)

Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)

Touch the sky!
Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)
Iron don’t lie! (Don’t lie!)

Bar hits rack

title: Don't Drop the Bar Bro
lyrics:
You warmed up?
I DID A CURL!
THAT’S ENOUGH! (THAT'S RIGHT!)

COME ON!
LET’S GO!
TURN IT UP!
LEG DAY, BABY!

Gym smells like pain
YEP!
And a protein shake expired in ‘08
STILL GOOD! 

You said, “Pre-workout’s just Red Bull”
That’s science, bro—YouTube proved it true
COME ON! FACTS! (FACTS!)

You flexed hard in the mirror alright
Pulled a muscle—still said, “I’M TIGHT!”
THAT COUNTED! (NO IT DIDN’T!)

You said, “Count it clean, man, don’t you lie”
NOW LIFT IT!
COME ON! DRIVE! (UP!) (LIFT IT!)

Don’t drop the bar, bro!
I GOT YOU!
SHAKIN’ BUT WE STILL HERE!

UP! UP! (AGAIN!) ONE MORE TIME!

You’re yelling “LIGHT-WEIGHT!”
WHEN IT CLEARLY AIN’T!
THAT DON’T COUNT! (ONE MORE!)

DON’T DROP THE BAR, BRO—
ESPECIALLY ON LEG DAY!

WHY?!
That’s illegal, man—what are you, nuts?
CALL THE COPS! (HE DROPPED THE BAR!)

You skipped cardio, said, “I lift, I don’t run”
Outta breath just walkin’ to the car, son
BREATHE! (SLOW DOWN NOW!)

Stretching’s fake—it’s not my plan
Pulled a hammy just puttin' plates on the stand
AGAIN?! (NOT AGAIN!)

You limped out proud, chest stuck out
WORTH IT, BRO!
ICE IT! (DOWN!)

ICE DON’T FIX IT!
BUT WE TRY! (COME ON!) COME ON!

Don’t drop the bar, bro!
QUIT TEXTIN’ MID-SET!
PUT THE PHONE DOWN!

You spot like you half asleep
Still countin’ wrong but yellin’ deep
THAT COUNTED! (NO IT DIDN’T!)

Different gym, same bad form
Still skippin’ leg day, still talkin’ to get warm
DON’T DROP THE BAR, BRO—
ONE! MORE! REP!

You said, “Nah man, that weight ain’t enough”
ADD MORE!
Started diggin’ plates out the dusty stuff
TWO MORE!

Threw on a forty-five like it owed you rent
Didn’t stretch once—said, “I’m already bent”
COME ON! (LET’S GO!)

“Slide another one on each side”

HEAVY! (REAL HEAVY!)

You nodded like, “Yeah… we’re good to try”
SEND IT! (LIFT IT!)

“Clamp it tight, don’t let it slide”
Hands already shakin’ before you tried
FOCUS! (BREATHE!)

Whole gym stopped just to watch this mess

TOO LATE NOW! (I GOT THIS!)

You sure about this?
BEEN SURE.
NO YOU AIN’T! (I GOT THIS!)

You ducked under, puffed your chest out wide

THAT COUNTS! THAT COUNTS!

Don’t drop the bar, bro, wherever you train
From ego lifts to lifetime pain
UP! UP! (AGAIN!) ONE MOR TIME!

Miles apart but I still hear
“YOU GOT ONE MORE!” in my ear
COME ON! DRIVE! (DON’T QUIT!)

Here’s to the reps, the laughs, the calloused hands
DON’T DROP THE BAR, BRO—
OR’ I'M TELLIN' EVERYBODY WHO YOU ARE!

Rack it.
That was clean.
No it wasn’t.
AGAIN!

ONE MORE PLATE! (LOAD IT UP!)
COME ON! (THAT COUNTS!)
LIGHT-WEIGHT! (LIGHT-WEIGHT!)

title: Forever and Ever (Gritty)
lyrics:

Forever and ever, we’re never alone
Forever and ever, we’re callin’ this home

November ninth, twenty-nineteen

My steady ground, my truth

Forever I’ll love you, as long as I breathe
Forever I’ll choose you, God’s gift to me
Through every high, every valley we go
With God as our anchor, we’re steady and whole

title: It's You
lyrics:
I see you walking in and the room lights up
Heart skips beats and I can’t keep up
Every little thing you do pulls me in

It’s you, it’s you
Girl, you’re always on my mind
It’s you, it’s you
Every touch, every kiss

IT’S YOU, IT’S YOU
EVERY TOUCH, EVERY KISS
IT’S YOU, IT’S YOU
YEAH, I’M SO OBSESSED

Every time, every time
It’s you…

title: Mi Luna
lyrics:
She shines bright in the darkest night

When the world gets heavy, pulls me down
She’s the calm when I’m unwound
One look and the noise disappears
Every doubt just fades from here

When I’m lost, she pulls me in

My love, my wife, my moon above
Mi Luna lighting up my road
Her touch, her smell, her kiss
Sets my restless heart at rest
When I look into her eyes
I lose myself, the whole world dies

My love, my life, my everything

Heart of fire, but gentle too

Pretty smile, kind blue eyes
A love that don’t come with a price
Feels so natural, like it’s always been

My love, my wife, my moon above
Mi Luna shining down on us
Her laugh, her faith, her touch
I’ll never thank the Lord enough

Feels like home no matter where we are

My love, my life, my everything

I’ve got all I’ll need in life

My love, my wife, my guiding light
Mi Luna in the midnight sky

She’s the best part of all of me
Forever feels so right and true
Every road leads back to you
God made her just for me
My love, my home, my destiny

title: Haunting Blue
lyrics:
She walks in and the whole room turns to stare

Those haunting blue eyes touch my soul

One smile melts this man right down
Leaves my heart beatin’ way too loud
Her touch ignites, sets me on fire
Subtle lips, slow burn desire
One kiss and I’m feelin’ undone
Yeah, she ain’t just beautiful — she’s the one

I don’t need sleep when she’s in my head

title: Rearview Memories
lyrics:
Sunrise spills on an empty road
Truck’s humming soft, miles to go

Warm hugs, your smile, your kiss
Every reason I don’t quit
Every mile, every prayer
Every moment shows you care
Rearview heart, lonely man
But love’s my road back home again

Yeah, love’s my road back home again…

title: Bent My Mind
lyrics:
I don’t scare easy, but I don’t sleep deep
Every sound’s got a shadow it keeps
I reed the room like there's a loaded gun
Smile on my face, but I’ve already run
I trust in pieces, not all at once
Every promise feels like it wants to jump

It didn’t break me, it bent my mind

I learned survival before I learned peace
I hear alarms where there’s no real heat
I’m not the same, always looking to the end
