I remember details nobody recalls
The way silence screams, the rise before the fall
I flinch at kindness, brace for the turn
Even good love feels like something to earn
I hold my breath in ordinary days
Like calm is just a trick that fades

I don’t forget, I just file it away
Every moment weighed like it’s evidence

It didn’t break me, it bent my mind
Taught my thoughts how to run and hide
I learned defense before I learn what to see
Built walls out of what was left of the pieces of me
I’m still standing, but I stand hyper aware
Some damage doesn’t show, it sharpens your stare

If I seem distant, I’m just avoiding the crowded room
If I go quiet, I’m fighting old wounds
I’m not cold, I’m conditioned
Not weak, just listening

It didn’t end me, it changed my view
Turned the world into shades of untrue
But I’m still here, still choosing to stay
Still learning how to feel without bracing for pain
I’m more than what I went through
But it left fingerprints inside my view

I’m healing slow, but I’m healing real
Learning safety is something you feel

title: Breathe
lyrics:
I used to wake up braced for the fall
Heart racing before nothing at all
Every quiet felt like a lie
Peace was a word I didn’t recognize
But somewhere between the cracks and days
I noticed the fear didn’t always stay

I’m not cured, I’m not clean
But I’m not where I used to be

I’m learning how to breathe again
Let the light in, little by little
I don’t need the armor I lived in
I’m stronger now, but softer in the middle
I still shake, but I stand my ground
I don’t run every time I hear a sound
I’m not healed, but I’m healing true
Hope came back when I started choosing me too

I stopped fighting the scars I wear
They tell the truth that I’m still here
I don’t apologize for pacing slow
Some roads you walk one step at a time alone
I found peace in the in-between
In ordinary moments I used to miss

I still remember, but I don’t drown
The past lost its grip when I slowed down

I’m learning how to breathe again
Trust the calm when it finally settles
I don’t need to live on edge anymore
Just to prove that I’m unbreakable
I still fall, but I rise with grace
I don’t punish myself for needing space
I’m not healed, but I’m healing through
And hope sounds like a voice saying, “You’re allowed to choose you”

Recovery ain’t a straight line
Some days I’m brave, some days I hide
But I don’t call that failure now
That’s just being alive somehow

I’m learning how to live again
Not just survive another season
I don’t flinch at joy like I used to
I finally believe I have a reason
I still carry what shaped my past
But it doesn’t get to steer my path
I’m not healed, but I’m healing too
And hope feels like freedom saying, “You made it through”

I’m still moving forward…
And that means everything.

title: I'm Still Here
lyrics:
I wake up with the lights already on
Heart beating like I did something wrong
Noises overload, make me want to run
Every night feels like it’s just begun

I keep my back to the wall when I sit
Read every face, every word they don’t say
I laugh it off but I don’t forget
Some nights I’m still stuck in yesterday

I left that place long ago but it followed me home
The guilt the shame untold, still feel the cold
I’m safe right now, or that’s what they say
But my mind quakes when the world fades away
I 'm here… but I ain’t okay

I don’t sleep much, just close my eyes
See it all like i'm there again
There is no safety, there is no trust
‘Cause pain don’t sneak — never plays hide-and-seek

I measure every exit, every sound
Hold my breath when a door slams shut
If peace is somewhere to be found
It don’t come easy — it don’t come much

I left that place long ago but it followed me home
The guilt the shame untold, still feel the cold
I’m safe right now, or that’s what they say
But my mind quakes when the world fades away
I 'm here… but I ain’t okay

I don’t need pity, don’t need a name
Just need my mind to let go of the blame
Some scars don’t show, they don’t fade
They just sit heavy inside your chest 
and cut you like a blade

I left that place but it won’t let go
Lives in my bones, in the words I don’t say
I’m still breathing, so I suppose
That counts for something 
I'm still here…but the dred won't stay away

Sun comes up
I’m still here
That’s the win
but I ain’t okay

title: Wide Awake
lyrics:
Intro 
Yeah
Dee-NOW (Dee-NOW)
Dee-NOW
Eyes up — don’t blink

Chorus
Wide awake, no sleep mode
Truth lit up, beast mode
Lamp full, yeah we ready
Watchin’ like He coming already
Wide awake, don’t drift
Faith loud, never timid
When the night try to pull on me
I’m wide awake — still watching

Verse 1
World scrolling, mind numb
Truth flashing, people run
Everybody chasing trends
But I’m locked in till the end
Jesus said stay alert
Not asleep in a fake church
Oil filled, lamp bright
I ain’t folding in the midnight
Pressure hits, stand firm
I don’t fold, I don’t swerve
King coming, no delay
So I live like today’s the day

Pre-Chorus
Eyes open (hey)
Heart steady (hey)
If He calls
We run

Chorus
Wide awake, no sleep mode
Truth lit up, beast mode
Lamp full, yeah we ready
Watchin’ like He coming already
Wide awake, don’t drift
Faith loud, never timid
When the night try to pull on me
I’m wide awake — still watching

Verse 2
Watch and pray, no disguise
Kingdom first, no compromise
Faith active, never lazy
Saved by grace, not maybe
Clock ticking, world loud
Still I don’t bow to the crowd
Living ready, locked in
I don’t fear what’s coming
Not perfect, still chosen
Eyes fixed, never broken
When He knock, I won’t hide
Door open, standing wide

Bridge 
Leader: Stay!
Crowd: AWAKE!
Leader: Watch!
Crowd: AND PRAY!
Leader: Who we live for?
Crowd: JESUS!
Leader: Every day!
Crowd: ALL THE WAY!

Final Chorus
Wide awake, no sleep mode
Truth lit up, beast mode
Lamp full, yeah we ready
Watchin’ like He coming already
Wide awake, don’t drift
Faith loud, never timid
When the night try to pull on me
I’m wide awake — still watching

Outro
Dee-NOW (Dee-NOW)
Dee-NOW
Stay ready
Stay awake

title: Foot of the Cross
lyrics:
I’ve been walkin’ with a stone in my chest
Every mile feels like I failed another test
I know the good, still I choose the wrong
Sing hallelujah with a broken tongue

I fed my hunger, starved my soul
Chased a fire that left me cold
Every promise I swore I’d keep
Now whispers when I try to sleep

I do the things I don’t wanna do
I don’t do the things I know are true
I’m shackled by the weight I bear
Lord, I need You to meet me here

Lord, meet me here
Lord, meet me here

There’s blood on my hands I can’t deny
Words I spoke that still won’t die
I took my share, then took some more
Left my love outside the door

I dressed up sin in a Sunday suit
Called it living, called it truth
But every step I took for me
Dug this hole a little deeper

I do the things I don’t wanna do
I don’t do the things I know are true
I’m buried underneath my shame
Still You keep calling my name

Calling my name
Calling my name

I repent for the hurt I caused
Lay it down
Every scar, every loss
Lay it down
Every lie I lived inside
Lay it down
Every sin I tried to hide
At the foot of the cross

Breakdown (half-time, whispered grit)
If mercy’s real, I need it now
I’m on my knees, don’t know how
I carry more than I can stand
If You don’t save me, no one can

I lay it down at the foot of the cross
Every failure, every loss
I ain’t clean, but I believe
Your grace is bigger than me

Lay it down
Lay it down
At the foot of the cross

I walked in heavy, I won’t walk the same
Still got scars, but I lost the chains

title: Lead Me Home, Good Shepherd
lyrics:
Intro
“The Lord is my Shepherd…
I shall not want.
He leads me… beside still waters.
He restores my soul.”

Verse 1 
Like sheep we wander, lost and weak
We do not know the way
No road within, no light inside
We drift and go astray

Verse 2
We see the fields, they look so wide
But cannot tell what’s true
What feels like life will lead to harm
If we don’t follow You

Pre-Chorus
Left to ourselves we lose our ground
Left to ourselves we fall
We need a voice that leads us home
We need Your guiding call

Chorus 
Lead us home, Good Shepherd
We cannot walk alone
You are the way before us
You are the road back home

Lead us home, Good Shepherd
Through valley, dark and long
We rest within Your leading
Your voice, our strength, our song

Verse 3
No map within these wandering hearts
No compass in our soul
Without Your hand to turn us back
We lose all self-control

Pre-Chorus
Left to ourselves we lose our ground
Left to ourselves we fall
We need a voice that leads us home
We need Your guiding call

Final Chorus
Lead us home, Good Shepherd
We cannot walk alone
You are the way before us
You are the road back home

Lead us home, Good Shepherd
Through valley, dark and long
We trust in You to guide us
Our Shepherd, sure and strong

Tag
Lead us home…
Lead us home…
Good Shepherd

title: Make Me a Faithful Tree
lyrics:
Make Me a Faithful Tree

Verse 1
You planted me in mercy’s soil,
Beside the living stream;
Your hidden roots sustain my soul
With grace I cannot see.

Refrain
O make me, Lord, a faithful tree,
Well rooted firm in Thee;
That all the fruit my life shall bear
Brings glory unto Thee.

Verse 2
What grows upon my waiting limbs
Reveals what feeds my heart;
For bitter roots bear bitter fruit,
And pride will tear apart.

Refrain
O make me, Lord, a faithful tree,
Well rooted firm in Thee;
That all the fruit my life shall bear
Brings glory unto Thee.

Verse 3
A good tree cannot evil yield,
Nor rotten fruit be sound;
The life within determines what
Upon its bough is found.

Bridge
Search me, Lord, and try my ways,
Expose what lies beneath;
Replace the stone within my chest
With roots of living faith.

Let living water flood my soul,
Let every dry place bloom;
Till branches heavy with Your grace
Break forth in holy fruit.

Final Refrain
O keep me, Lord, a faithful tree,
Well rooted firm in Thee;
Till every fruit from every branch
Brings praise eternally.

Outro
I’m rooted in You,
Rooted in You.

Every branch, every leaf,
All for You.

Prune me, shape me,
Grow Your truth.

I’m rooted in You,
Only You.

title: Make a Good Tree in Me
lyrics:
Make Me a Good Tree
Verse 1

Lord, You planted me in mercy
Down by grace’s stream
Said, “Stand tall in My forgiveness
Grow in Me and be clean”

I’ve seen sunshine, I’ve seen sorrow
Felt the wind and rain
But every season’s shown me
I can’t stand on my own name

Pre-Chorus
If my roots run deep in Jesus
Good fruit’s gonna grow

Chorus
Make me a good tree, Lord
Rooted in Your Word
Bearing fruit that honors You
In deed and thought and word

If there’s anything within me
That don’t look like Your Son
Cut it back and shape my heart
Till Your will is done

Verse 2
I’ve seen branches split by pride
And leaves turn dry and brown
When I tried to feed on selfishness
My spirit withered down

What’s beneath the surface
Soon the world will see
‘Cause the fruit upon my branches
Shows what’s inside of me

Pre-Chorus
If my roots run deep in Jesus
Good fruit’s gonna grow

Bridge 
No more rotten roots, Lord
No more hidden sin
Search me through and through again
Cleanse me from within

Lay the axe to every limb
That’s fighting You somehow
I surrender all of it
I’m Yours completely now

Grow in me love and mercy
Grow in me Your peace
Let the fruit of Heaven
Flow from these old leaves

Final Chorus
Make me a good tree, Lord
Standing firm and strong
Bearing fruit that glorifies
You my whole life long

If there’s anything within me
That don’t look like Your Son
Cut it back and shape my heart
Till Your will is done

Till Your will is done

title: Remember Me
lyrics:
I watched Him climb that rugged hill,
The cross pressed down by human will;
A crown of thorns upon His head,
Yet not a word the Savior said.

They stretched Him wide on cruel wood,
The hammer fell, the earth it shook;
They nailed His hands, they nailed His feet,
As heaven held its breath to the beat.

O Lamb of God—lifted high,
Hear this sinner’s broken cry;
Remember me—remember me—
O Christ who died on Cal-va-ry.

I cursed the Man upon that tree,
With dying lungs and blasphemy;
Condemned by law, by guilt, by sin,
No hope in sight, no light within.

O Lamb of God—lifted high,
Hear this sinner’s broken cry;
Remember me—remember me—
O Christ who died on Cal-va-ry.

They pierced His side, the sky grew dim,
The light of day withdrew from Him;
I turned my head with failing breath,
One final plea before my death.

O Lamb of God—lifted high,
Hear this sinner’s broken cry;
Remember me—remember me—
O Christ who died on Cal-va-ry.

He turned His face though death drew near,
And spoke through pain both calm and clear:
“This day with Me you shall abide,”
Then bowed His head—and so He died.

O Lamb of God—lifted high,
Hear this sinner’s broken cry;
Remember me—remember me—
O Christ who died on Cal-va-ry.

Remember me…
O Christ who died on Cal-va-ry.

title: Remove the Log
lyrics:
I see the speck in someone else
So quick to call it wrong
But there’s a beam before my sight
That I have carried long

I speak as if I clearly see
And stand in judgment tall
Yet miss the weight before my eyes
That blinds me through it all

Before I try to fix a wound
Before I speak what’s true
Search my heart and clear my sight
I’m starting here with You

Remove the log from my eye
Teach me mercy first
Let love speak louder than my pride
Before I judge or curse

You never crushed the weak with truth
Nor shamed the ones You met
You knelt beside the broken hearts
With mercy deeper yet

If You judged me the way I do
I’d have nowhere left to stand
So break my pride, restore my sight
And place me in Your hands

Take the beam, take the weight
Take the right I think I have
Make me low and make me kind
Make me love like You have

Before I try to fix a wound
Before I speak what’s true
Search my heart and clear my sight
I’m starting here with You

Remove the log from my eye
Teach me mercy first
Let love speak louder than my pride
Before I judge or curse

Remove the log from my eye
Teach me mercy first

Remove the log from my eye
Teach me mercy first

title: Same Mouth
lyrics:
Same mouth that cries out Jesus, save me
Same lips whisper words that break me
We lift our hands on Sunday morning
Then cut each other down without warning
How did fire and living water
Both find a home inside each other
I reed the Word but still ignore it
Say I love Him, then I hurt His image

Do we not see, do we not feel
Every careless word makes his wounds more real
Tongues like swords, we justify
But Heaven hears every cry

How can the mouth that prays
Be the mouth that curses the same?
How can the lips You healed
Still spill poison, anger, and shame?
Every word, every sound
Is another nail driven down
How can the mouth that prays
Be the mouth that curses again?

Are we so callous, are we so proud
Speaking death like it won’t echo loud
We laugh it off, saying just let me be
But grace was never cheap or free
I see the hurt in Jesus’ eyes
Every time I choose my pride
Every careless joke, every cruel line
Is a hammer coming down through space and time

Are we so arrogant to believe
That mercy doesn’t hear what we speak?
The cross still bleeds, the weight remains
For every word that causes pain

How can the mouth that prays
Be the mouth that curses the same?
How can the lips You healed
Still spill poison, anger, and shame?
Every word, every sound
Is another nail driven down
How can the mouth that prays
Be the mouth that curses the same?

Set a guard, Lord, over my tongue
Teach my heart before words are sung
Let my speech be seasoned with grace
Let them see You when I speak Your name
Create in me a heart made new
Let my mouth tell only truth
If I claim the cross, I wear
Let my words show that I care

Life and death are in my hands
Teach me how to understand
If I say I follow You
Let my mouth prove it’s true

How can the mouth that prays
Be the mouth that curses the same?
Jesus, break me, remake me
Wash these lips in holy flame
Let my words be worship now
Not another hammer down
Let the mouth that prays
Be the mouth that brings You praise

Same mouth… new song
Same heart… made strong
Let my words look like the cross
Sowing seeds, not loss

title: Same Sky
lyrics:
I rise with the fire of the morning light
Called to lead, called to guard the fight
I carry warmth, I carry weight
Learning love means more than strength

I glow when the night feels long and deep
Holding peace while the world sleeps
I don’t hide the light I show
I know how to let it flow

Different callings, different ways
Still we move by heaven’s grace

Like the sun and moon in the same sky
We don’t compete, we align
I shine, you reflect the truth
He leads, she brings the light through
Different rhythms, perfect tune
That’s how the sun loves the moon

The sun says “go,” the moon says “stay”
One builds the road, one makes it safe
One stands bold, one stands near
Together we calm each other’s fear

When I burn too hot, you cool my flame
When you doubt, I speak your name
You remind me who I am
I remind you where we stand

Not above you, not behind
Side by side in God’s design

Like the sun and moon in the same sky
Faithful through the passing time
One gives light, one gives peace
Both are how the darkness leaves
Same promise, different tune
That’s how the sun loves the moon

So when the day fades into night
We still move by the same light
Every season, every phase
We’re reflecting heaven’s ways

title: Shape of Sacrifice
lyrics:
There’s a father on his knees late at night
Praying strength into tired hands
A mother giving pieces of her heart
So her child has a chance to stand
Love don’t always come with applause
Sometimes it bleeds, sometimes it breaks
It’s quiet, holy, unseen
But it’s written in the choices they make

Every “yes” costs something
Every cross has weight
But love keeps walking forward
Even when the road won’t wait

That’s the shape of sacrifice
Love laid down so life can rise
From a manger to a wooden tree
From a home to Calvary
Hands that give, hearts that stay
Fathers, mothers, Christ who paid
Different stories, same price
All love wears the shape of sacrifice

There’s a Savior with a crown of thorns
Breathing mercy through the pain
He could’ve called down angels
But love chose nails instead of chains
He saw our names before the scars
Knew the cost and stayed anyway
The greatest gift the world would know
Was a life He freely gave

Every tear held purpose
Every wound brought grace
He turned suffering into freedom
And death into a doorway

That’s the shape of sacrifice
Love laid down so life can rise
From a manger to a wooden tree
From a home to Calvary
Hands that give, hearts that stay
Fathers, mothers, Christ who paid
Different stories, same price
All love wears the shape of sacrifice

It’s staying when it’s easier to leave
It’s believing when you cannot see
It’s breaking so another heart survives
It’s love that gives up its own life

That’s the power of sacrifice
Hope reborn in willing hearts
Every prayer, every sleepless night
Every tear God never forgot
What was lost is multiplied
Grace written in every life
Through the cross and family ties
We are saved by sacrifice

From heaven’s throne to a child’s bed
Love was spoken, love was led
Forevermore the truth remains
Sacrifice is love’s true name

title: Turn That Other Cheek
lyrics:
He said if they strike you on the cheek…
Turn the other one.
That ain’t weakness…
That’s Kingdom work.

They hit my pride and I felt that heat
Boots dug deep in red clay street
Old flesh whisper, “Make ‘em pay”
But the Spirit say, “Walk My way.”

They talk my name, they twist my truth
Throw shade like they bulletproof
Everything in me wants revenge
But that ain’t what the cross produced

If they take my coat in the cold
Lord help me loosen my hold
If they push me down in the dirt
Let forgiveness take control

If they curse my name out loud
Let me bless ‘em anyhow
If they make me walk that mile
Help me walk it with a smile

I’ll turn that other cheek
When it don’t make sense to me
Let mercy be the proof
Of what You did on Calvary

Love the ones who wound my heart
That’s where Your power starts
Even when it’s hard to breathe
I’ll turn that other cheek

If they ask forgiveness quick
While the pain still sittin’ thick
Flesh say “hold that memory”
But grace say “let it slip.”

Anybody love their own
That ain’t where the seed is sown
But love the one who did you wrong
That’s when heaven’s really shown

You forgave from that old tree
Blood and mercy covering me
If You loved Your enemies
You can do that work in me

Vengeance ain’t my road to walk
Justice in Your sovereign thought
I’m just tryna look like Christ
Even when my feelings hot

If they curse my name out loud
Let me bless ‘em anyhow
If they strike me face to face
Let me answer back with grace

I’ll turn that other cheek
When it don’t make sense to me
Let mercy be the proof
Of what You did on Calvary

Love the ones who wound my heart
That’s where Your power starts
Even when it’s hard to breathe
I’ll turn that other cheek

Father forgive them —
That’s what You said
Nails in Your hands
Thorns on Your head

If You could love like that
While the world went dark
Then break this pride in me
And soften up my heart

I’ll turn that other cheek
Set this captive free
Let mercy rise in me
Till the world can see

Even when it’s hard to breathe
Even when they wound me deep
By the cross inside of me
I’ll turn that other cheek

title: Where the Worm Does not Die
lyrics:
There is a pit beneath the holy ground
where the fire waits, and the lost are found
Yet never satisfied with endless death
The worm lives deep within the depth
It does not rest, it does not cease
it chews forever never any peace

Our tongues are split and crying out
For drops that never fall
We knew His name
We knew His voice
We chose not to call

Where the worm does not die
And the fire is never quenched
gnashing of teeth of an empty cry
Every second stretched
No water given, no relief
This is the end of borrowed breath
And the forever heat

No night, no dawn, no passing time
Just smoke that rises, thick and slow
The burning flesh doesn't pay the crime
The distant light we will never know
Every prayer we never meant
Got us to this place we were sent

We begged too late with broken words
The thirst now never to heed
The door was shut
The sentence sealed
Eternity agreed

Where the worm does not die
And the fire is never quenched
The throat still burns, the soul still begs
But mercy’s hand is clenched
No finger dipped in cooling grace
No Lazarus to plead our case
Just endless sight of heaven’s edge

Outer darkness
Gnashing teeth
Names sealed
The book shut tight
Smoke ascends forever night

Where the worm does not die
Where the fire never sleeps
No rest for soul
Tossed into the deep
Thirst without a single drop
Heat without a flame
Judgment breathes and knows us all
And calls us by name

Water and light are just memories
Only fire remains
Souls burning in the flame

title: Praise the Lord, O My Soul
lyrics:
Praise the Lord, O My Soul

Verse 1
From rising sun to setting light
Your Name is lifted high
The heavens sing Your majesty
The earth responds in cry

With every breath You give to us
Our hearts return in praise
All glory be to You alone
Forever all our days

Chorus
Let all that has breath
Praise the Lord
Let every heart
Praise the Lord
We bless Your holy Name
Forevermore
Let all that has breath
Praise the Lord

Hook
Praise the Lord, O my soul
Praise the Lord, O my soul
All that is within me
Praise the Lord

Verse 2
With thankful hearts and lifted hands
Before Your throne we bow
Not for the gifts within Your hand
But for Your glory now

In spirit and in truth we come
Your mercy we proclaim
From age to age You still remain
Forever still the same

Chorus
Let all that has breath
Praise the Lord
Let every heart
Praise the Lord
We bless Your holy Name
Forevermore
Let all that has breath
Praise the Lord

Hook
Praise the Lord, O my soul
Praise the Lord, O my soul
All that is within me
Praise the Lord

Bridge
Holy, holy, Lord of Hosts
Worthy is the Lamb
Heaven and earth cry out as one
Great I am

Chorus
Let all that has breath
Praise the Lord
Every nation
Praise the Lord
We bless Your holy Name
Forevermore
Let all that has breath
Praise the Lord

Hook
Praise the Lord… O my soul…
Praise the Lord… O my soul…

title: Step Out and Go
lyrics:
Step Out and Go

Verse 1 
Lord, call me from my place of fear
Command me now to go
If You say “Come,” I will draw near
If You say “Go,” I’ll go

Verse 2
The world is dark, the winds are strong
But still Your voice is clear
Go tell the lost where light is found
And I will meet you there

Pre-Chorus
Though little faith may live in me
Your Spirit makes me stand
You send me out upon the water
And hold me in Your hand

Chorus
Step out and have faith
Step out and go
Carry the light
Into the unknown

Step out and have faith
Do not delay
Tell of His grace
Proclaim His name

Verse 3
If I should tremble at the call
Or fear what lies ahead
Your promise overcomes all
By every word You’ve said

Pre-Chorus
You speak — the storm must lose its roar
The darkness cannot stay
The gospel is the power of God
I will not turn away

Bridge
Who will go and tell the world?
Here am I — send me

Who will stand upon His Word?
Here am I — send me

The fields are white, the time is now
Let every fear release
Step out upon His mighty Word
And carry heaven’s peace

Final Chorus
Step out and have faith
Step out and go
Carry the light
Into the unknown

Step out and have faith
Lift up His name
Jesus is Lord
Forever He reigns

Tag
Here am I — send me
Here am I — send me
Step out and have faith

title: A Man Like Him
lyrics:
Every mornin’ when it's time to rise
He bows his head and lifts his eyes
Coffee strong and a Bible worn
He thanks the Lord for another morn

Hammer rings on a weathered board
Fixes what’s broke, asks nothin’ more
Blood on wood and sweat on skin
That’s the way it’s always been

He’s a husband true and a father strong
A Pap Paw teachin’ right from wrong
He walks the line, he don’t pretend
He lives his faith till the very end
If you need help, he won’t say “when”
He’ll be there fast, a faithful friend
The good Lord knows and understands
The world needs more of a man like him

He mows the yard, takes out the trash
Loads the truck and hauls it back
Plays with little ones till the daylight fades
Laughs real soft in the evening shade

He grills the meat, he feeds the poor
Serves the church, sweeps the floor
If there’s work to do, he’ll lend a hand
That’s how he loves his fellow man

He’s a husband true and a father strong
A Pap Paw teachin’ right from wrong
He walks the line, he don’t pretend
He lives his faith till the very end
If you need help, he won’t say “when”
He’ll be there fast, a faithful friend
The good Lord knows and understands
The world needs more of a man like him

His hands are rough from years gone by
Calloused palms and a gentle side
He served his country, stood his ground
Carried his duty quiet and proud

Built his home with blood and sweat
Built his faith with no regret
When the night gets cold and the road gets dim
You can rest your hope on a man like him

He’s a husband true and a father strong
A Pap Paw teachin’ right from wrong
He walks the line, he don’t pretend
He lives his faith till the very end
When his work is done and his race is ran
He’ll lay it down in the Lord’s own hands
The good Lord knows and understands
Heaven’s built for a man like him

He’s a husband true and a father strong
A Pap Paw teachin’ right from wrong

title: Wait Hold Up
lyrics:
Brain on its own clock, call it slow-mo
Thoughts hit late, but they land like whoa
You crack a joke, I’m a step behind
Two beats later, laugh comes online

Small talk?  What? I’m literal, give me the facts
I’m lining up my words like domino tracks
Missed your wink? Nah, just processing
Silent mode on, No Expressin

Patterns jump out like “hello, hello”
Details you miss? I notice, I know
Hyperfocus mode, I go full introspective
Lost in the data, my mind’s selective

Think it, blink it, I’ll get there
Brain moves slow, but I swear
Think it, blink it, don’t rush me
Different pace, but trust me

Think it, blink it, I’ll arrive
Slow processing, but I thrive
Think it, blink it, timing bends
Late to the laugh, but I see the end

Sarcasm flies like “what did you just say?”
I hear the words, not the hidden play
Rules unwritten, I make my own
Navigate the world in my slow-zone

Social signals? Those are a miss
Catch me later, I’ll add the twist
I replay conversations like director’s cut
Hit the right notes when the timing’s up

I don’t fake laughs just to fit in
My humor comes late, but it always wins
Different OS, same human heart
Just running life a little apart

Processing… almost done…
Wait—yeah, got it now.
Hit me with the next one.

Literal thinker, bars concrete
Metaphors hit, but I keep it neat
Missed your cue? Don’t worry, friend
I’ll circle back and land at the end

Overthinking? Yeah, it’s my brand
Details stacked like a card-hand
But I notice the things you overlook
Life’s hidden lines are in my book

Delayed reaction, but strong effect
Watch me land it, respect the intellect
Not broken, not flawed, just wired this way
Slow to move, but I’ll always stay

Think it, blink it, I’ll get there
Brain moves slow, but I swear
Think it, blink it, don’t rush me
Different pace, but truly me

Think it, blink it, I’ll arrive
Slow processing, but I thrive
Think it, blink it, timing bends
Late to the laugh, but I see the end

title: You're Done!
lyrics:
Little feet pounding on the floor
Sticky hands on the door
Laughing loud like the rules don’t matter
Mama’s patience is running out

Blocks on the floor, juice down the hall
She says it once, then once more y’all
Love in her heart but her eyes say “no”
That warning tone starts getting low

She says it calm, she says it slow
But every kid already knows

Do it again — you’re done!
Mama don’t bluff when she’s already warned
One more move, one more run
She draws that line and it’s in her tone
She loves you deep, but she’s not the one
When she says it thrice — yeah, you’re done!

Baby's being crazy waving hands in the air
Grinning like they just don’t care
Mama shakes her head just right
“That’s it, don’t test me tonight”

She says, “If you keep on, I swear—
You’re going to the dang living room!”
That room don’t play, that room means time
Where the day gets quiet and it's time to unwind

She says it sharp; she says it clear
That’s the sound of bedtime drawing near

Do it again — you’re done!
Mama don’t bluff when she’s already warned
One more jump, one more run
She draws that line and it’s in her tone
She loves you deep, but she’s not the one
When she says it thrice — yeah, you’re done!

It’s not mean, it’s how she survives
Raising wild hearts, shaping lives
Every warning’s a lesson learned
Every “you’re done” is love in disguise

Someday they’ll laugh, grown and tall
About the dang living room and all

Do it again — you’re done!
From chaos loud to a full stop sound
Mama’s voice weighs a ton
When the house won’t settle down
She loves you fierce, more than anyone
But when she says it like that —
Yeah… you’re done!

Lights go low, the house slows down
Mama breathes in the quiet now
Tomorrow comes, the fun’s not gone
But tonight?
yeah, you’re done!

title: Just Strollin Through
lyrics:
He’s got Star Wars on his t-shirt, joystick in his hand
Animal Crossing towns built better than he planned
Morning routes and mailroom jokes, knows everybody’s name
Makes a friend in five minutes, leaves without playing the game
Truth gets stretched like a fishing line, but it’s all in fun
That sideways smile says he’s already won

Sometimes in a hurry, but never stuck in one lane
Just rollin’ with the moment, lettin’ life do its thing

He’s just strollin’ through, no map, no rules
Laughin’ too loud, breakin’ half the tools
Dancin’ on a boat, little buzz, no shame
Late nights, bright lights, forgettin’ the day
From mailroom floors to a neon moon
He ain’t lost, he’s just strollin’ through

Uncle Bob’s specials down at Mr. Sancho’s bar
One too many stories ‘bout how wild things are
Tipsy feet on a rocking deck, music in his bones
Midnight fun hangovers, still knows his way home
Sonic cups and 7-Brew runs, caffeine dreams come true
TikTok strolls with bad puns to use

Game night slump, cereal bowl
Ice cream melts while he loses control
Sometimes he can’t deal, needs to cool it down
Turns the world off, lets the bed spin ‘round

He’s just strollin’ through, no map, no rules
Laughin’ too loud, breakin’ half the tools
Dancin’ on a boat, little buzz, no shame
Late nights, bright lights, forgettin’ the day
From mailroom floors to a neon moon
He ain’t lost, he’s just strollin’ through

Helps the littles wilth what their doin’
Quiet heart behind the jokes he’s throwin’
iPhone hacks as he's walkin through the door
Studyin’ cruise ship plans like a treasure map score
Knows every deck, every bar, every view
Still askin’ if the drink package still has a few

Yeah the world spins fast, but he don’t mind
He’s got time to waste and a good time to find

He’s just strollin’ through, stayin’ light, stayin’ loose
Chasin’ laughs like there’s nothin’ to lose
Put on a show, let the night run long
Wrong key, right heart, singin’ along
If life’s a road, he’s takin’ the scenic view
A little wild, a little true
He ain’t stuck, he ain’t done
He’s just strollin’ through, Having fun

Yeah, just strollin’…
Smilin’ like he always knew.

title: Let it All Hang Out
lyrics:
She’s got beads all around from a diamond dream,
Lost in a book where the brave still believes
Hooks and yarn, little blankets for the small,
A heart so big she could wrap us all
She hums a melody while the moons still up,
Hands lifted high, never holding back love
she moves souls with signs, and sings the truth,
Every note says this is who I am, this is proof

She’s not quiet, she’s stands tall,
She’s learned the beauty of giving it all

She’s spreading her wings, letting heaven see
Every wild, honest part of who she’s meant to be
Smart and sassy, strong and loud,
Laughing like freedom, standing proud
She wants love, she wants to feel it deep
But she won’t dim her light just to be seen
She lives out loud, no doubt about
She lets it all hang out

Lake water shining like a summer spell,
Kneeboard cuts, wakeboard yells
Wind in her hair, fearless grin,
Falls down laughing, climbs back in
Controllers clicking late at night,
Magic worlds and wizard fights
She believes in more than what you see,
In courage, hope, and destiny

She signs the words her soul already knows,
Love is louder when you let it show

She’s spreading her wings, letting heaven see
Every wild, honest part of who she’s meant to be
Smart and sassy, strong and loud,
Laughing like freedom, standing proud
She wants love, she wants to feel it deep
But she won’t dim her light just to be seen
She lives out loud, no doubt about
She lets it all hang out

She’s got faith in her bones and fire in her chest,
Not chasing perfect, just giving her best
If you love her, love her wide and true,
She’s not made to hide—she’s made to move

She’s spreading her wings, watch her rise
No fear in her heart, no shame in her eyes
Big heart, open hands, fearless shout,
This is what living’s all about
She wants love, yeah, she believes somehow
It’s waiting for her—she won’t settle now
She’s everything she was meant to be
Letting the whole wide world finally see

Yeah, she lets it all hang out
And that’s what sets her free

title: Sugar and Grace
lyrics:
Sugar & Grace

Verse 1
She’s in the classroom every Sunday
Coffee warm and Bible worn
Circle full of other women
Hearts a little tired and torn
She don’t preach with polished phrases
She just lives what she believes
And somehow when she’s praying
Every heavy heart finds peace

Pre-Chorus
She’s walked through storms we never saw
And still her faith stands tall

Chorus
She’s got heaven in her whisper
Got mercy in her hands
She loves you like your family
Before you understand
When you ask her ’bout her children
She’ll grin and softly say,
“I sold ’em at a yard sale once,”
She laughs it off that way,
But God had sweeter plans for her
Than she could ever pray.
And we all can see it somehow
It’s clear as it can be
She’s mothered half the church by now
With grace so tenderly

Verse 2
She’s first in line for game night
Brings a treat and laughs out loud
Sits with us at Sunday lunches
Never needs to draw a crowd
Comes over for family dinner
Like she’s always belonged
And if there’s cards upon the table
She’ll stay the whole night long

Verse 3
At home there’s little Sugar
Waiting by the door
Won’t step a paw outside
If she ain’t walking out before
She’ll say, “Come on now Sugar,
Let’s go get some air,”
Then gives her “candy” from her hand
Like a secret they both share

She talks to her like company
Like kinfolk in the room
And Sugar listens faithful
Like she understands it too

Pre-Chorus 2
She don’t just talk of Jesus
She lets you see His face

Chorus
She’s got heaven in her whisper
Got mercy in her hands
She loves you like your family
Before you understand
When you ask her ’bout her children
She’ll grin and softly say,
“I sold ’em at a yard sale once,”
She laughs it off that way,
But God had sweeter plans for her
Than she could ever pray.
And we all can see it somehow
It’s clear as it can be
She’s mothered half the church by now
With grace so tenderly

Bridge
Sugar’s curled beside her
While she kneels down by her bed
Calling out our broken names
One by one she said
Lord keep them, Lord guide them
Lord help them stand strong
And long before we ever knew
She’s been praying all along

Some dreams bloom in hidden soil
Some tears turn into praise
God writes the quiet miracles
In ordinary days

Final Chorus
She’s got heaven in her whisper
Got mercy in her hands
She loves you like your family
That’s always been His plan
She jokes about the yard sale
But heaven knows the truth
Every life she’s covered in prayer
Is living, breathing proof
If you wanna see what Jesus
Looks like faithfully
Just sit beside that older saint
And learn humility

title: That's Just How She Is
lyrics:
She gives that look like she’s over it,
Eyes roll first, then that mischievous grin.
Always got a plan before you even ask,
Textin’ up the group like it’s her favorite task,
“Y’all wanna hang out?” she’s already to begin,
Laughin’ loud, pullin’ everybody in,
With a little nudge or a push, she opens the door,
Next thing you know, you’re stayin’ for more.

That’s just how she is, heart open wide,
Little bit loud, but she loves with pride,
From singin’ praise with her voice lifted high,
To servin’ midweek with a tired smile,
She’s real, she’s honest, she lives it out loud,
Faith don’t whisper when she’s around,
Yeah some folks talk, but I’ve learned because—
That’s just how she is.

Cups on the counter in every style,
Got a favorite one for every mile,
Bogg bags packed like she’s ready to go,
Craft room chaos, but she runs the show,
Puzzles spread out on the kitchen table,
Pups underfoot, barkin’ when they’re able,
She’ll shop all day, five minutes behind,
Still showin’ up, every single time.

That’s just how she is, heart open wide,
Little bit loud, but she loves with pride,
From singin’ praise with her voice lifted high,
To servin’ midweek with a tired smile,
She’s real, she’s honest, she lives it out loud,
Faith don’t whisper when she’s around,
Yeah some folks talk, but I’ve learned because—
That’s just how she is.

Hair done fresh and her nails look right,
Dressed up nice even midweek night,
She’ll cut your hair and say “Don’t you move,”
Laughin’ loud sayin’ “I got this, trust me, dude,”
She’ll call you out, then pray you through,
Love ain’t quiet when it’s true.

That’s just how she is, rough and refined,
Strong in her faith, soft in her time,
From worship songs to everyday grace,
She leaves a little light in every place,
Yeah I married into more than blood,
I gained a front-row seat to a heart full of love,
No title needed, no label because—
That’s just how she is.

Eyes rollin’, voice ringin’ strong,
Cups a clinkin’, singin’ along,
Family by chance, blessed because—
That’s just how she is.

title: Hands of a Man
lyrics:
Sunrise hittin’ the windshield, rig hummin’ down the line
Strappin’ down the heavy load, hookin’ pontoons just in time
Grease on his hands, back’s sore and worn, but he keeps on movin’
Every wrench, every mile, every burden proves he’s provin

Dogs fed, fence mended, sound board hummin’ at church
Neighbor calls, he don’t think twice, lendin’ hands comes first
Father, husband, son, and friend, wearin’ all his hats with pride
A quiet fight, a steady heart, faith always by his side

Diesel roars, the long road waits
He carries the load, he meets his fate
Through the grind, the sweat, the span
You’re not alone, my brother, man

Night falls heavy, temptations call, the fight don’t ever end
But he stands firm, dust on boots, and faith around the bend
Engines fixed, oil changed, motors roar back to life
Through the struggles and the miles, he walks the line

Hands rough, heart strong, sweat drippin’ in the sun
Through every mile and every trial, the work ain’t ever done
And when the weight feels too much, and hope seems thin
You’re not alone, my brother, I’m right here with you, my kin

Diesel roars, the long road waits
He carries the load, he meets his fate
Through the grind, the sweat, the span
You’re not alone, my brother, man
The life he lives, the love he shows
Faith and family, it quietly grows

Stand strong, when the load’s too heavy to bear
You’re not alone, my brother, I’m right there
A calloused hand, a steady back, a listening ear, a prayer
Through dust and sweat, through every mile, someone cares

title: Please Stay With Me (Child)
lyrics:
Sunlight spills across my room
I tiptoe, dreaming of the afternoon
Spinning in my princess gown
Laughing as I twirl around

LEGO towers touch the sky
Barbies talking as they fly
Every little moment feels so bright
And I whisper softly into the light

I don’t wanna rush, I don’t wanna grow
I just want to hold on to what I know
Mommy’s arms and Lolli and Pop’s hugs
All these little things that fill me up

I just wanna stay right here
With all the beautiful things I feel
The laughter, the love, the glow
I just want it real

Floor is lava, jump so high
Freeze dance under the bright blue sky
Princess dresses, spinning around
Every corner magic is found

Candy, giggles, ballet spins
Adalyn’s laughter makes me grin
I build my world, I take it slow
With Mommy’s love helping me grow

I hear tomorrow calling me
But I’m still holding onto everything
Every hug, every whispered word
Every tiny song I’ve heard

Please stay with me, don’t go away
These beautiful things I want to keep today
Mommy’s love, Adalyn’s hand in mine
Lolli and Pop’s, laughter frozen in time

Please stay with me, hold me tight
Every little moment feels so right
I don’t wanna grow too fast, don’t let it fade
These beautiful things, I want to stay

Sometimes the world moves too fast
I want these moments to always last
Mommy says, “You’re safe, you’re loved”
And I feel it rise like stars above

At Lolli and Pop’s, it’s magic here
Barbies and LEGO, laughter near
Princess gowns and spinning floors
I don’t want to leave these doors

Please stay with me, don’t go away
These beautiful things I want to keep today
Mommy’s love, Adalyn’s hand in mine
Lolli and Pop’s, laughter frozen in time

Please stay with me, hold me tight
Every little moment feels so right
I don’t wanna grow too fast, don’t let it fade
These beautiful things, I want to stay

Sunlight fades, but I still know
I’ll carry these moments wherever I go
With love, with laughter, with make-believe
Please stay with me…

title: Please Stay With Me (Mom)
lyrics:
Sunlight spills across their room
Tiny feet dancing, chasing the afternoon
Alivia twirls in her princess gown
Laughing as she spins around

LEGO towers stacked so high
Barbies talking, reaching the sky
Every little moment feels so bright
And I whisper softly in the light

I don’t want them to grow too fast
I just want to hold on to these days that last
Mommy’s arms, Lolli and Pop’s hugs
All these little things that fill them up

I just want to stay right here
With all these beautiful things so near
The laughter, the love, the glow
I just want it slow

The floor is lava — jump so high
Freeze dance under the bright blue sky
Princess dresses spinning on the floor
Every corner magic to explore

Candy, giggles, ballet spins
Adalyn laughing as her sister grins
I watch them play, I hold my breath
Every little moment, a treasure left

I hear the world calling them ahead
But I want to keep them safe instead
Every hug, every whispered word
Every tiny song I’ve heard

Please stay with me, don’t go away
These beautiful things I want to keep today
Alivia’s laugh, Adalyn’s hand in mine
Lolli and Pop’s love frozen in time

Please stay with me, hold them tight
Every little moment feels so right
I don’t want the years to rush, don’t let it fade
These beautiful things, I want to stay

Sometimes I wish I could freeze the day
Keep their wonder, let it stay
I watch them fall, I watch them rise
Holding their hearts in my eyes

Princess gowns, LEGO towers tall
Candy crumbs and giggles in the hall
At Lolli and Pop’s, joy everywhere
I want to keep them safe, keep them there

Please stay with me, don’t go away
These beautiful things I want to keep today
Alivia’s laugh, Adalyn’s hand in mine
Lolli and Pop’s love frozen in time

Please stay with me, hold them tight
Every little moment feels so right
I don’t want the years to rush, don’t let it fade
These beautiful things, I want to stay

Sunlight fades but my heart knows
I’ll carry these moments wherever I go
With love, with laughter, with make-believe
Please stay with me…

title: Changed
lyrics:
I ran with the crowd, I wore the mask
Chasing every trend, every moment that wouldn’t last
Ink on my skin, approval in my eyes
If they said I was winning, I thought I was alive
Mirrors meant more than my soul inside
If it looked good on the outside, I was fine

But the louder the cheers, the quieter my heart
Every new thing just tore me apart

Then You found me right where I stood
When the world stopped feeling good
All the glitter lost its shine
When Your truth collided with my life
Now all I want is grace and faith
A cross, not the crowns I tried to chase
The world don’t pull me like it did
My heart is Yours—I’m finally free

I heard Your voice through the noise
Calling me out of the mess I enjoyed
Eyes opened wide, ears finally heard
Every promise written inside Your Word
What I lived for fell apart
You rebuilt me, every piece of my heart

What I thought I needed slipped through my hands
But You gave me peace I don’t understand

Yeah, You found me right where I stood
When the world stopped feeling good
All the idols lost their throne
When You showed me I wasn’t alone
Now I live for truth and light
Not the crowd, not the fight
The world don’t own me like it did
My heart is Yours—I’m finally free

No more chasing shadows
No more living pretend
I laid my old self down
And was born again
Salvation changed my name
Faith rewrote my plans
What the world couldn’t give
You placed in my hands

You found me right where I stood
I'm no longer misunderstood
Now eternity’s in my sight
Not the world, not the night
All I need is You alone
Jesus, You’re my way back home
The world lost its grip on me
My heart is Yours—forever free

I once lived for the world…
Now I live for the Word.
Yes, yes Jesus I live for you

title: Don't Remember Me
lyrics:
If my name ever crosses your mind one day,
If you hear my voice when you kneel and pray,
Don’t lift me up, don’t sing my praise,
I’m just a sinner saved by mercy and grace.

I’ve seen this world turn bitter and mean,
Hearts grow hard where love should be,
And it cuts me deep, the pain I see,
Lord knows this life can be heavy on me.

Mm-hmm… mercy, Lord
Yes, grace…

If my life ever says a word at all—
Let it tell ‘em ‘bout the Lord
If my feet ever walks a narrow road—
Point ‘em to the cross

Don’t remember me—
Remember the cross
The blood that was shed—
For the sinner lost
If my voice moves your heart to believe—
Fall on your knees
At the foot of that old rugged tree

I’m just a sign on a dusty road—
Pointin’ home
To a Savior who carried the load—
Jesus bore it all
If you see anything good in me—
Give Him the glory
Let it lead you straight to Jesus, not me

I love every soul, the broken, the weak,
The ones who still think they’re too far gone to reach,
I’ve sat with the hurt, I’ve heard their cries,
Seen hope come alive through tear-filled eyes.

This world’s got a way of tearing you down,
Chewing up faith, grinding saints in the ground,
But there’s a hope that never runs dry—
It stood in a grave… and walked out alive.

He got up!
Yes He did!

I ain’t the truth, I ain’t the way—
Jesus Is!
I’m just a voice trying to say—
He saves!

Don’t remember me—
Remember the cross
The nails, the thorns—
The sacri-fice
If my song ever reaches your soul—
Let Him take control
Fall down at Calvary

I’m just a witness, I can't save—
Give it! to a risen King and an empty grave—
The grave couldn’t hold Him!
If you hear anything when I speak—
Hear Jesus!
Let it sound like Jesus calling you, not me

I didn’t save you
He Does!
I didn’t bleed
He Did!
I didn’t rise on the third day
Jesus did!

I didn’t break those chains you wear
He broke ‘em!
I just know the One who meets you there
Thank You, Lord!

So don’t remember me—
Remember His name!
The One who took our guilt and shame—
Jesus!
If my life ever leaves a trace—
Let it point to grace!
And mercy flowing from that place

When my days are done and my voice is still—
He’s still God!
Let the echo stand on that lonely hill—
Calvary!
Remember Jesus…
Don’t remember me

Remember the cross…
Remember His name…
Jesus… Jesus…

title: Finally Let You In
lyrics:
I ran from the whisper in the middle of the night
Shut my ears to the truth, hid from the light
Every time You knocked, I turned away
Hard-headed heart, I said, “Not today”

I knew that pull deep down in my chest
That holy fire wouldn’t let me rest
I called it fear, I called it doubt
But it was You tryin’ to draw me out

Every road I took to run away
Still somehow led me back Your way

Then I laid it down, every crown, every wall
Every fear I was afraid to call
Mine to carry, mine to control
When I surrendered, You took my soul
My eyes were opened, I finally saw
My ears could hear Your gentle call
My heart was changed, made brand new
The moment I said yes to You

I can see it now, every step behind
Every closed door, every perfect time
You placed me where only I could stand
Right there, right then, inside Your plan

What I thought was random, what I thought was chance
Was heaven moving with holy hands
You knew the place, You knew the hour
You knew the weight of gospel power

Every tear I cried, every prayer I missed
Was shaping me for moments like this

So I laid it down, every crown, every wall
Every fear I was afraid to call
Mine to carry, mine to control
When I surrendered, You took my soul
My eyes were opened, I finally saw
My ears could hear Your gentle call
My heart was changed, made brand new
The moment I said yes to You

Peace like a river, floodin’ my soul
Joy I can’t explain, takin’ control
Not by my strength, not by my might
But by the Spirit, alive inside

I give the glory
I give the praise
To the Father who planned my days
To the Son who paid my cost
To the Spirit who never stopped

Never stopped
Never stopped
You never stopped

I laid it down, every crown, every wall
Every fear I was afraid to call
Mine to carry, mine to control
When I surrendered, You took my soul
My eyes are open, now I see
My ears can hear what You speak to me
My heart is Yours, forever true
I’m alive because of You

I ran, I fought, I tried to hide
But grace was waiting on the other side

title: On My Body
lyrics:
I wore my story on my skin
Every mark where sin had been
Ink and memories intertwined
A former heart, a former mind
I didn’t ask the Father’s will
I only chased what I thought felt real
These markings spoke of who I was
Before I knew redeeming love

Now I read Your Word and I understand
This body was always in Your hands
A living temple, bought with blood
Not mine to boast, but Yours, O God

These tattoos on my body
They don’t define my soul
They tell the story of a man
Before You made me whole
If I could wash them off so
I’d let the old man go
They remind me who I was
Not who I am in You, my Lord

I don’t display them, I don’t brag
I keep them covered, I won’t drag
The old identity back to life
That died with You that night
Your mercy runs much deeper still
Than every needle, every thrill
My flesh may wear the former name
But my spirit bears Yours, unashamed

You said my life would bring You praise
Not marked by pride, but holy ways
So now I glorify You, God
With every breath, with every thought

These tattoos on my body
They don’t define my soul
They tell the story of a man
Before You made me whole
If I could wash them off so
I’d let the old man go
They remind me who I was
Not who I am in You, my Lord

Crucified with Christ, I live no more
Your Spirit wrote a better law
Not on my skin, but on my heart
Where truth and grace now leave their mark
I am not bound by former sin
I’m clothed in Christ, made new within

These tattoos on my body
Are fading day by day
But what You’ve done inside of me
Will never pass away
My life proclaims Your holiness
My heart, Your dwelling place
I may wear marks of yesterday
But today I live for Your great name

So let my life be living proof
Not ink or flesh, but gospel truth
I am redeemed, forever free
Your glory written over me

title: Out of Ashes
lyrics:
I walked through valleys I didn’t choose
Shadowed days, bruised by truth
My tears were prayers with no sound
Faith on its knees, face to the ground
I asked You why, I asked You when
All I heard was silence again

But You were near when I couldn’t feel
You were working wounds I couldn’t heal

You don’t waste the broken places
You don’t turn away from pain
You write redemption into suffering
And call it by my name
You trade mourning clothes for praise
Breathe life into what was slain
Out of ashes, You raise beauty
Out of sorrow, You remain

I learned endurance in the fire
Hope was born when strength expired
You counted every sleepless night
Held my heart through every fight
What the enemy meant for the grave
You bent toward mercy, You bent toward grace

I was weak, but You were strong
You carried me when I couldn’t go on

You don’t waste the broken places
You don’t abandon those who fall
You bind the wounds of the shattered soul
You restore what fear stole
You turn scars into testimony
Chains into living proof
Out of the suffering, You make a witness
Out of the wounded, You speak truth

Though I walk through the darkest valley
I will not fear, You’re close to me
Your rod, Your staff, they steady my breath
You lead me through, not just to death
But resurrection waits beyond the pain
A living hope that bears my name

Now I stand redeemed, not ashamed
The old has passed, I’m not the same
What tried to break me bowed to Christ
By His wounds, I found new life
If anyone is lost like I was then
Let this be the truth I send
Suffering shaped me—but salvation saved me
And hope rose up in the end

You were faithful in the fire
You were faithful in the storm
And I am living proof
That You restore.

title: You See Me
lyrics:
I lift my eyes, the stars are burning
Endless light across the dark
Time and space are bending, turning
Every orbit marks Your mark

I am small, a breath, a moment
Here and gone before I know it
Yet You speak and worlds awaken
At the whisper of Your voice

How big is our God, how wide, how strong
He holds the night, He holds the dawn
I am dust, I am days
Still You know my name

Planets spin in perfect motion
Every star obeys Your law
From the depths of every ocean
To the sparrow when it falls

You who measure out the heavens
Chose the cross, the nails, the grave
You stepped down into our weakness
So the lost could now be saved

How big is our God, how deep His reign
The cosmos bends before His name
I am small, yet fully known
A child You call Your own

If the stars cry out Your glory
If the skies declare Your worth
Who am I that You would love me
Still You came to save this earth

Bigger than the endless ages
Stronger than the grave and death
Yet You’re closer than my heartbeat
Closer than my breath

How big is our God, eternal King
From silent space to everything
I am small, yet not unseen
Held in what You’ve always been

How big is our God, let all proclaim
The stars, the skies, the earth, His name

title: Before Anyone Else
lyrics:
Alarm’s calling my name way too soon
Sunlight flirting with the edge of the room
Hair a mess, feet finding the floor
Heart still dreaming, wanting more

House is quiet, holding its breath
Then I smell you and I forget the rest

You’re my first love in the morning
Before the world gets a say
When your warmth starts pouring
I feel myself starting to come awake
I wrap my hands around you now and forever
In that chipped old porcelain cup
Yeah, I fall for you every sunrise
With that first sip of my morning love

Sun peeks through like it’s jealous of you
Things to do are knocking, but they can wait too
For a moment it’s just me and the steam
Slow dancing in between

Every worry fades into the air
When I’m standing right there

You’re my first love in the morning
Before the noise rushes in
When your kiss hits my lips softly
I remember who I am again
I don’t need diamonds or letters
Just the way you wake me up
Yeah, I fall for you every sunrise
With that first sip of my morning love

It’s not crazy if it’s true
I plan my mornings around you
You know my flaws, my sleepy eyes
Still you save my life every time

Breathe you in… slow it down…
Five more minutes before I turn around

You’re my first love in the morning
My calm before the day begins
When the world feels heavy and hurried
You pull me back in
I swear I’d choose you forever
If I only got one cup
Yeah, I give my heart every sunrise
To that first taste of my morning love

Cup’s empty, but I’m full somehow
Alright, baby… I’m ready now

title: The Table
lyrics:
This old wood’s got scratches, stories in the grain
Crumbs from yesterday, coffee rings and names
Mail spread out beside a half-read verse
Laundry folded slow while the pot still simmers
Kids talk over grace, somebody rolls their eyes
Life’s loud, life’s messy, but we bow our heads this time

We don’t always agree
We don’t always get it right
But we keep coming back
Every single night

’Cause the dinner table’s holy ground
Broken hearts and bread passed around
We laugh, we cry, we pray it through
Every seat tells a story too
It’s where love learns how to stay
Where forgiveness finds a way
From our hands to Heaven’s will
The table’s teaching us still

Homework tears and wedding plans
Hard conversations, holding hands
Gossip whispered, truths confessed
Joy laid bare, anger laid to rest
Friends drop by, pull up a chair
There’s always room, there’s always prayer
If you’re hungry, you belong
Doesn’t matter where you’re from

Some nights it’s quiet
Some nights it’s war
But grace keeps walking
Through the door

’Cause the dinner table’s holy ground
Where the lost get found
We share the weight, we break the bread
Say the things we left unsaid
It’s where mercy meets our shame
Where God knows us by our name
Every tear, every meal
The table makes us real

Long ago, a table held the Son
Bread was broken, love begun
Not a throne, just open hands
A promise sealed in a simple plan
So we gather here the same
In His likeness, in His name
If He served and made room
Then so will we—
’Til He comes again

Yeah the dinner table’s holy ground
Grace enough to go around
Every chair can hold one more
Just like it did before
From our chaos to His peace
This is where we’re made complete
In the breaking, in the sharing
God is always there

So pull up close, don’t stand alone
This table feels like home
Every meal, every prayer
He’s already sitting there

title: Holy Beyond Measure
lyrics:
Before the mountains learned to stand
Before the oceans kissed the land
You spoke the dark into the light
And every star obeyed Your might

The heavens shake at just Your name
Angels veil their eyes in flame
No throne compares, no power stays
Before the Ancient of all days

Not love alone, not grace alone
But fire and light around Your throne
You are not common, You are not near
Unless You draw us through holy fear

Holy, Holy, Holy is the Lord
Set apart, eternal, unmatched, adored
Glory like thunder, mercy like rain
All of creation cries out Your name

Holy, Holy, none beside You stands
The Alpha, Omega, the Great I Am
We fall undone, yet You invite
The Holy God, wrapped in light

The ground is sacred where You are
Burning bush, consuming fire
You are not shaped by mortal thought
You cannot be tamed, controlled, or bought

Justice rolls from righteous hands
Truth unbending, perfect plans
Yet still You call the dust to live
Still You choose to love, forgive

The weight of glory bows our knees
We breathe in awe, we tremble, please
You are not safe, yet You are good
The Holy God, misunderstood

Holy, Holy, Holy is the Lord
Set apart, eternal, unmatched, adored
Glory like thunder, mercy like rain
All of creation cries out Your name

Holy, Holy, none beside You stands
The Alpha, Omega, the Great I Am
We fall undone, yet You invite
The Holy God, wrapped in light

Who can stand before Your throne?
Who can claim You as their own?
Only by the blood You gave
Only by the grace that saves

Fire and mercy intertwine
Justice kissed by love divine
Heaven roars, the veil is torn
The Holy One, yet not withdrawn

Holy, Holy, Holy is the Lord
Earth and heaven now respond
King of glory, fear and flame
Every knee bows to Your name

Holy, Holy, forever You reign
Time itself speaks You remain
We fall undone, yet You invite
The Holy God, wrapped in light

Holy beyond measure
Holy beyond words
Holy forever
You are the Lord

title: Moved with Compassion
lyrics:
He saw the crowd from the mountainside
Every broken heart, every tear they cried
Didn’t look away, didn’t pass them by
Love in His eyes, hope alive

He stepped right in, He reached right out
Spoke healing where there was doubt

Moved with compassion, strong and kind
Love with the power to change a life
When He speaks, the dark gives way
Joy breaks out, the blind can see
He lifts the weak, He calls us friends
Grace that starts and never ends
The King of heaven walks with us
All authority, all love, all trust

He touched the ones no one would hold
Spoke their worth to the lost and old
“Come to Me,” hear the mercy call
Every chain about to fall

Every word steady and true
Hope rising when He moves

Moved with compassion, strong and kind
Love with the power to change a life
When He speaks, the dark gives way
Joy breaks out, the blind can see
He lifts the weak, He calls us friends
Grace that starts and never ends
The King of heaven walks with us
All authority, all love, all trust

Winds and waves know His voice
Hearts awaken, we rejoice
Kingdom come, let hope arise
Heaven breaking through our lives

Gentle hands, a sovereign throne
Heaven near, we’re not alone

Moved with compassion, lifted high
Joy in His name, we’re alive
Every burden laid down today
Freedom found when He makes a way
He reigns in love, He leads in light
Mercy strong, our future bright
The Son of Man, the Risen One
All authority—His love has won

All authority
All compassion
Jesus

title: Stones Don’t Become Bread
lyrics:
Forty days in the desert, dust on His skin
Silence so loud, hear the war within
Hunger in the body, Spirit standing tall
Enemy whispers like he’s doing Him a favor, not a fall

“If You’re really the Son, prove who You are
Turn these stones to bread, show Your power, go far”
But He stood on the Word, not the need of the flesh
He didn’t bow to the moment, He trusted what’s next

Every promise twisted, every lie dressed clean
But truth don’t bend when temptation screams

Stones don’t become bread when faith takes the stand
Man don’t live by hunger but the Word in His hands
From the peak to the pit, He never let go
Kingdoms were offered, but He chose the cross road
He said no to the crown, said yes to the will
Victory whispered on a desert hill

On the highest rooftop, wind in His face
“Jump and the angels will catch You in grace”
Scripture misquoted, truth turned thin
But God’s Word ain’t a tool for the pride of men

“You don’t test the Father, you trust His name”
Not chasing spectacle, not playing games
Strength in surrender, power restrained
Heaven was watching, hell felt the pain

Stones don’t become bread when faith takes the stand
Man don’t live by hunger but the Word in His hands
From the peak to the pit, He never let go
Kingdoms were offered, but He chose the cross road
He said no to the crown, said yes to the will
Victory whispered on a desert hill

Bow once, rule all, just worship me
But the Lamb don’t kneel to the enemy
Every knee gonna bow, every tongue confess
But not by shortcuts, not by compromise stress
Written Word sharp like a two-edged blade
Devil left defeated when the Son obeyed

Stones don’t become bread, lies don’t win
Truth stood firm and the war caved in
Tempted in all ways, yet without sin
The battle was loud but the victory was Him

Angels came running, strength restored
The desert bloomed when He spoke the Word

title: Upon the Holy Mount
lyrics:
Upon the Holy Mount

Verse 1
The mountain shook beneath His voice
Dark clouds concealed the sky
The trumpet called from holy flame
No soul dared venture nigh

The earth stood still in trembling hush
Beneath His sovereign might
The Holy God of majesty
Revealed His blazing light

Chorus
Holy God of Sinai flame
We bow in trembling awe
Through Christ upon Mount Calvary
Fulfilled is every law

The Lamb who bore the mountain’s fire
Has drawn our hearts in peace
From shaking ground to sacred grace
Our worship shall not cease

Hook
Holy, Holy, God Most High
All glory be Your name
Holy, Holy, lifted high
Forever You remain

Verse 2
Who can behold consuming light
And yet not be undone?
For dust before eternal fire
Finds mercy through the Son

Yet from the cloud You called our name
Through thunder, flame, and fear
The Holy One enthroned above
Still draws His children near

Chorus
Holy God of Sinai flame
We bow in trembling awe
Through Christ upon Mount Calvary
Fulfilled is every law

The Lamb who bore the mountain’s fire
Has drawn our hearts in peace
From shaking ground to sacred grace
Our worship shall not cease

Hook
Holy, Holy, God Most High
The heavens speak Your name
Holy, Holy, lifted high
Forever You remain

Bridge
The sky grew dark, the earth was moved
The temple veil was torn
The Judge of all bore holy wrath
That we be now reborn

The grave could not contain His life
The stone was rolled away
The Holy One of Sinai
Now reigns in endless day

Now trembling turns to grateful praise
Now fear gives way to trust
The fire that once revealed our sin
Now lifts our eyes in trust

Final Chorus
Holy God of Sinai flame
Now crowned in victory
The Lamb who bore the thunder’s weight
Reigns through eternity

We stand in awe yet lift our voice
In worship calm and free
From trembling fear to holy love
You reign in majesty

Hook
Holy, Holy, God Most High
All glory be Your name
Holy, Holy, lifted high
Forever You remain

Amen…
Amen…

title: You Spoke
lyrics:
I was lost, I was torn
No rest till Your mercy came
In the silence, in the storm
I heard You call my name

You spoke, and I was free
Your mercy covered me
You lifted every chain
Jesus, I was changed

Every fear began to leave
When Your light broke through
What was bound was left in peace
I was made new in You

You spoke, and I was free
Your mercy covered me
You lifted every chain
Jesus, I was changed

You spoke
Storms left
You spoke
Chains released

You spoke, and chains released
Your name brought perfect peace
You spoke, and I was free
Jesus, You set me free

You spoke, and I was free
Your mercy covered me
You lifted every chain
Jesus, I was changed

You set me free
You set me free
Jesus, You set me free

title: Agape Love
lyrics:
Agape Love

Verse 1
Before I knew to call Your name
Your mercy called to me
Before my feet had walked Your way
You hung upon that tree
No greater love could e’er be shown
No deeper grace bestowed
You bore my sin, You claimed my heart
And made this sinner whole

Chorus
Agape love, agape love
That would not let me go
Agape love, agape love
Washed me white as snow
It found me lost and brought me home
It paid my every debt
Agape love, agape love
I’ll never, no never forget

Verse 2
Not by my works, not by my will
Could I Your favor gain
Yet still You climbed that rugged hill
And bore my guilt and shame
With nail-scarred hands and wounded side
You sealed redemption’s song
Now I am Yours and You are mine
Where I forever belong

Chorus
Agape love, agape love
That would not let me go
Agape love, agape love
Washed me white as snow
It found me lost and brought me home
It paid my every debt
Agape love, agape love
I’ll never, no never forget

Bridge
Lead: Love that saved me
Harmony: Saved my soul
Lead: Love that claimed me
Harmony: Made me whole

Love that lifted me from the grave
Love that broke every chain
Agape love forever reigns

Final Chorus
Agape love, agape love
That would not let me go
Agape love, agape love
Washed me white as snow
It found me lost and brought me home
It paid my every debt
Agape love, agape love
I’ll never, no never forget

Tag
I’ll never, no never forget
Agape love

title: Every Breath, Your Name
lyrics:
EVERY BREATH, YOUR NAME

Verse 1

Before my tongue could form a word,
Before my heart could claim,
You gave me breath within my lungs
To speak Your holy Name.

Verse 2

In every rise and falling chest,
In every breath proclaim,
The sound of life within my bones
Still echoes, “Yah — weh” Name.

Verse 3

The winds that move across the earth
Breathe out the very same.
All flesh that lives and draws in air
Declares Your covenant Name.

Chorus

Yah — weh, Yah — weh, breath of life,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh;
With every breath I breathe Your Name,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh.

Verse 4

You formed the dust and breathed it full,
Your Spirit’s living flame;
And every breath I borrow now
Returns to You again.

Chorus

Yah — weh, Yah — weh, breath of life,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh;
With every breath I breathe You Name,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh.

Bridge

Inhale — Yah
Exhale — Weh
Life begins and ends this way;
Every breath that I Breathe
Still proclaims Your holy Name.

Inhale — Yah
Exhale — Weh
Let the nations join the praise.
All creation breathing loud
Yah — weh, Yah — weh.

Final Chorus

Yah — weh, Yah — weh, breath of life,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh;
With every breath I breathe Your Name,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh.

Yah — weh, Yah — weh, breath of life,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh;
Till my final breath I breathe,
Yah — weh, Yah — weh.

Outro

Inhale… Yah
Exhale… Weh
Every breath…
Your Name.

title: Worth It All
lyrics:
If my eyes are drawn away
By the glitter of the flame
If my heart begins to trade
Holy truth for lesser gain
When the quiet compromise
Whispers softly in the dark
Give me grace to turn and run
Before it takes my heart

It’s better now to lose the lie
Than lose the life You give

You are worth it all
You are worth it all
If it pulls my heart from You
I let it fall
I let it fall
No shadow stands, no idol calls
Jesus, You are worth it all

If my hands hold bitterness
If my pride won’t bend its knee
If there’s anything in me
That keeps my soul from being free
Search the corners of my heart
Where I hide what no one sees
I don’t want what breaks Your heart
I want what pleases Thee

It’s better now to feel the fire
Than live in silent chains

You are worth it all
You are worth it all
If it pulls my heart from You
I let it fall
I let it fall
No shadow stands, no idol calls
Jesus, You are worth it all

You can have my eyes
You can have my hands
You can have my heart
I surrender

You can take it all
Anything at all
If it keeps me from Your love
I surrender

Bridge Tag (Big Room Moment)

Better to enter life with You
Than hold to what I lose
Better to enter life with You
Jesus, I choose You

You are worth it all
You are worth it all
Everything that keeps me bound
I let it fall
I let it fall
No fear remains, no idols tall
Jesus, You are worth it all

Take it all
Take it all
If it keeps me from Your heart
Take it all
